-- Constants

local enableAnalytics = true
local analyticsSessionID = 0
local version = "1.178"
local playformat = "DTRW2" -- needs to be updated when proxia cards are changed, or when spoilers turn to index cards

local analyticsURL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxoAvWye7SAYJUgT-N2Ybklwzalu8KMJJSwlcHXuB3VWyEu0V-xwiUNOLPADdnScCEU5w/exec"

-- FNV-1a 32-bit hash
function fnv1a_32(str)
    local hash = 0x811c9dc5
    for i = 1, #str do
        hash = bit32.bxor(hash, string.byte(str, i))
        hash = bit32.band(hash * 0x01000193, 0xFFFFFFFF)
    end
    return hash
end

-- Make a clean slug: lowercase, dashes for spaces, strip punctuation (incl. '/').
local function slugify(name)
  local s = (name or ""):lower()
  s = s:gsub("%s+", "-")         -- spaces -> dash
  s = s:gsub("[^%w%-]", "")      -- strip everything that's not [a-z0-9-]
  s = s:gsub("%-+", "-")         -- collapse repeats
  return s
end

function sendAnalytics(eventName, player, extra)
  if version=="dev" then return end
  local sid = player and player.steam_id or ""
  -- anonymize the player's steam id
  local anonID = sid ~= "" and fnv1a_32("cruxisfine" .. sid) or 0
  local payload = {
    mod       = "Grand Archive : Fracturized",
    version   = version,
    event     = eventName,
    timestamp = os.time(),
    session   = analyticsSessionID,
    player    = anonID,
    extra     = extra or {},
  }
  local body    = JSON.encode(payload)
  local headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" }

  WebRequest.custom(
    analyticsURL,      -- url
    "POST",            -- method
    true,              -- download response body
    body,              -- data to send
    headers,           -- headers
    function(req)      -- callback
      if req.is_error or req.response_code >= 400 then
        print(string.format(
          "Analytics ➜ ERROR %s: %s",
          tostring(req.response_code),
          req.error or req.text
        ))
      end
    end
  )
end

-- ============================================================
-- ReplayNet.lua (client-side replay batching + upload for TTS)
-- ============================================================
-- Design goals:
-- - Batch events in memory, POST them to your Next.js endpoints
-- - First POST includes REPLAY_START and returns { matchId, token }
-- - Subsequent POSTs include { matchId, token }
-- - Finalize endpoint returns a human code (shareable)
-- - Verbose debug prints (since no notebook storage anymore)
--
-- NOTE: Your server endpoints may not exactly match this yet.
--       This client is structured so you can tweak payload/URLs in one place.
-- ============================================================

REPLAY_STATE = 1
-- 0 Offline (finalized)
-- 1 Recording
-- 2 Attract

function GetReplayState()
  return REPLAY_STATE
end


replay_log_enabled = true
replay_log_debug = false
DG_URL = replay_log_debug and "http://localhost:3000" or "https://dungeongui.de"

ReplayNet = {
  -- ---- config ----
  baseUrl = DG_URL,
  startPath = "/api/replay/start",      -- POST -> { matchId, token }
  eventsPath = "/api/replay/events",    -- POST -> { ok=true }
  finalizePath = "/api/replay/finalize",-- POST -> { code="ABCD-1234" }

  -- ---- batching ----
  seq = 0,
  queue = {},
  flushScheduled = false,
  flushInFlight = false,

  maxBatchSize = 500,     -- flush when queue reaches this many events
  flushDelaySec = 2.0,  -- debounce flush a bit to group bursts

  -- ---- replay identity ----
  matchId = nil,
  token = nil,
  finalized = false,

  -- ---- time ----
  startTime = os.clock(),
}

local function dbg(...)
  if not replay_log_debug then return end

  local tab = getOrCreateErrorTab()
  local timestamp = os.date("%H:%M:%S")

  local parts = {}
  for i = 1, select("#", ...) do
    parts[i] = tostring(select(i, ...))
  end

  local line = "[" .. timestamp .. "] " .. table.concat(parts, " ")

  if tab.body ~= "" then
    tab.body = tab.body .. "\n" .. line
  else
    tab.body = line
  end

  editNotebookTab(tab)
  print("Debug:", ...)
end


function getOrCreateErrorTab()
  local tabs = getNotebookTabs()

  for _, t in ipairs(tabs) do
    if t.title == "Replay Errors" then
      return t
    end
  end

  local tab = {
    title = "Replay Errors",
    body = "",
    color = "Red"
  }

  addNotebookTab(tab)
  return tab
end

function err(msg)
  local tab = getOrCreateErrorTab()

  local timestamp = os.date("%H:%M:%S")
  local line = "[" .. timestamp .. "] " .. tostring(msg)

  if tab.body ~= "" then
    tab.body = tab.body .. "\n" .. line
  else
    tab.body = line
  end

  editNotebookTab(tab)

  print("ERROR:", msg)
end



local function nowMs()
  return math.floor((os.clock() - ReplayNet.startTime) * 1000)
end

local function urlJoin(base, path)
  if string.sub(base, -1) == "/" then base = string.sub(base, 1, -2) end
  if string.sub(path, 1, 1) ~= "/" then path = "/" .. path end
  return base .. path
end

local function trimSpaces(str)
    if str == nil then
      return ""
    end
    return str:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
end

local function to_slug(s)
  if not s or s == "" then return "" end
  s = trimSpaces(s:lower())
  s = s:gsub("%s+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("[',]", "")
  s = s:gsub("[^%w%-]+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("%-+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("^%-+", ""):gsub("%-+$", "")
  return s
end

local function randomGUID()
    local chars = '0123456789abcdef'
    local res = {}
    for i=1,6 do
        local rand = math.random(#chars)
        res[#res+1] = chars:sub(rand, rand)
    end
    return table.concat(res)
end

local function split_on_slash(name)
  local left, right = name:match("^(.-)%s*/%s*(.+)$")
  return {left and trimSpaces(left) or trimSpaces(name), right and trimSpaces(right) or nil}
end

-- Pretty-print any Lua value (tables included)
function prettyPrintLua(value, indent)
  indent = indent or 0
  local pad = string.rep("  ", indent)

  if type(value) ~= "table" then
    print(pad .. tostring(value))
    return
  end

  print(pad .. "{")
  for k, v in pairs(value) do
    local key = tostring(k)
    if type(v) == "table" then
      print(pad .. "  " .. key .. " =")
      prettyPrintLua(v, indent + 2)
    else
      print(pad .. "  " .. key .. " = " .. tostring(v))
    end
  end
  print(pad .. "}")
end


local function extractReplayDataFromCard(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end

  local states = obj.getStates()
  local curState = obj.getStateId()

  -- canonical guid (state 1 if present)
  local guid = obj.guid
  if states and curState > 1 then
    guid = states[1].guid
  end

  -- FRONT (state 1)
  local frontSlug, frontUUID

  if states and states[1] and curState>1 then
    frontSlug = slugify(split_on_slash(obj.getName())[1])
    frontUUID = (parseGMNotes(states[1].gm_notes or "") or {}).uuid
  else
    frontSlug = slugify(obj.getName())
    frontUUID = (parseGMNotes(obj.getGMNotes()) or {}).uuid
  end

  local result = {
    guid = guid,
    slug = frontSlug,
    uuid = frontUUID
  }

  -- BACK (only if currently not in state 1)
  if states and curState > 1 then
    local backNotes = parseGMNotes(obj.getGMNotes()) or {}
    result.back = {
      slug = slugify(split_on_slash(obj.getName())[2]),
      uuid = backNotes.uuid
    }
  end

  return result
end

local function buildEvent(eventType, playerColor, visibility, data, cards)
  ReplayNet.seq = ReplayNet.seq + 1

  local evt = {
    meta = { seq = ReplayNet.seq, ms = nowMs() },
    type = eventType,
    player = playerColor or "",
    visibility = visibility or "public",
    data = data or {}
  }

  if cards then
    local cardSnapshots = {}

    for key, obj in pairs(cards) do
      local snap = extractReplayDataFromCard(obj, true)
      if snap then
        cardSnapshots[key] = snap
      end
    end

    -- Promote primary card if present
    if cardSnapshots.card then
      evt.card = cardSnapshots.card
      cardSnapshots.card = nil
    end

    -- Nest remaining cards into data
    for key, extrasnap in pairs(cardSnapshots) do
      evt.data[key] = extrasnap
    end
  end

  return evt
end

local function pushEvent(evt)
  table.insert(ReplayNet.queue, evt)

  if replay_log_debug then
    dbg("enqueue", evt.type, "seq=" .. tostring(evt.meta and evt.meta.seq), "q=" .. tostring(#ReplayNet.queue))
  end
end

local function httpPostJson(url, payloadTable, onOk, onFail)
  local ok, payload = pcall(function()
    return JSON.encode(payloadTable)
  end)

  if not ok then
    err("JSON.encode failed:", payload)
    return
  end

  dbg("----- HTTP POST BEGIN -----")
  dbg("URL:", url)
  dbg("Payload bytes:", #payload)
  dbg("Payload JSON:")
  dbg(payload)

  local headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" }

  WebRequest.post(url, payload, function(request)
    dbg("----- HTTP RESPONSE -----")

    if request.is_error then
      err("HTTP ERROR:", request.error)
      err("URL:", url)
      err("RAW RESPONSE:", request.text or "<nil>")
      if onFail then onFail(request.error) end
      return
    end

    local code = tonumber(request.response_code) or 0
    local body = request.text or ""

    dbg("Status:", code)
    dbg("Body bytes:", #body)
    dbg("Body raw:")
    dbg(body)

    if code < 200 or code >= 300 then
      err("Non-2xx status:", code)
      err("Body:", body)
      if onFail then onFail("http_" .. tostring(code)) end
      return
    end

    local decoded = nil
    if body ~= "" then
      local ok2, res = pcall(function() return JSON.decode(body) end)
      if ok2 then
        decoded = res
        dbg("Decoded JSON:")
        dbg(JSON.encode(decoded))
      else
        err("JSON.decode failed:", res)
      end
    else
      dbg("Empty body")
    end

    if onOk then onOk(decoded) end
  end, headers)
end


function ReplayNet.clear()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  ReplayNet.seq = 0
  ReplayNet.queue = {}
  ReplayNet.flushScheduled = false
  ReplayNet.flushInFlight = false
  ReplayNet.matchId = nil
  ReplayNet.token = nil
  ReplayNet.finalized = false
  ReplayNet.startTime = os.clock()
  dbg("cleared")
end

function ReplayNet.ensureStarted()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  if ReplayNet.finalized then
    dbg("ensureStarted ignored (finalized)")
    return
  end

  -- If we already have a matchId+token, we're started.
  if ReplayNet.matchId and ReplayNet.token then return end

  -- If queue is empty, seed a REPLAY_START so the first flush always includes it.
  if ReplayNet.seq == 0 then
    pushEvent(buildEvent("REPLAY_START", "Global", "public", {}, {}))
  end
end

local function scheduleFlush()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  if ReplayNet.flushScheduled then return end
  ReplayNet.flushScheduled = true

  Wait.time(function()
    ReplayNet.flushScheduled = false
    ReplayNet.flush()
  end, ReplayNet.flushDelaySec)
end

function ReplayNet.log(eventType, playerColor, visibility, data, cards)
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  if not GA_DGCrystalRecorder then return end
  if ReplayNet.finalized then
    dbg("drop event (finalized):", eventType)
    return
  end

  ReplayNet.ensureStarted()

  local evt = buildEvent(eventType, playerColor, visibility, data, cards)
  pushEvent(evt)

  if #ReplayNet.queue >= ReplayNet.maxBatchSize then
    ReplayNet.flush()
  else
    scheduleFlush()
  end
end

-- ------------------------------------------------------------
-- Upload protocol:
--   If no matchId/token yet -> POST start with initial batch
--   Else -> POST events with batch + matchId + token
-- ------------------------------------------------------------
function ReplayNet.flush()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  if ReplayNet.flushInFlight then
    dbg("flush skipped (in flight)")
    return
  end

  if ReplayNet.finalized then
    dbg("flush skipped (finalized)")
    return
  end

  if #ReplayNet.queue == 0 then
    return
  end

  ReplayNet.flushInFlight = true

  -- Snapshot and clear queue immediately (so gameplay keeps logging)
  local batch = ReplayNet.queue
  ReplayNet.queue = {}

  local function requeueBatchFront()
    -- put the batch back at the front if upload failed
    local newQueue = {}
    for i = 1, #batch do newQueue[i] = batch[i] end
    for i = 1, #ReplayNet.queue do newQueue[#newQueue + 1] = ReplayNet.queue[i] end
    ReplayNet.queue = newQueue
  end

  if not (ReplayNet.matchId and ReplayNet.token) then
    -- START
    local url = urlJoin(ReplayNet.baseUrl, ReplayNet.startPath)
    local payload = {
      events = batch,
    }

    dbg("flush START", "batch=" .. tostring(#batch))

    httpPostJson(url, payload,
      function(res)
        ReplayNet.flushInFlight = false

        if not res then
          err("start: empty response")
          requeueBatchFront()
          return
        end

        -- expect: { matchId="...", token="..." }
        ReplayNet.matchId = res.matchId or res.id or ReplayNet.matchId
        ReplayNet.token = res.token or res.writeToken or ReplayNet.token

        if not (ReplayNet.matchId and ReplayNet.token) then
          err("start: missing matchId/token in response")
          dbg("start response keys:", JSON.encode(res))
          requeueBatchFront()
          return
        end

        dbg("started:", "matchId=" .. tostring(ReplayNet.matchId), "token=" .. tostring(string.sub(ReplayNet.token, 1, 6)) .. "…")

        -- If more events accumulated while we posted, flush again quickly.
        if #ReplayNet.queue > 0 then
          ReplayNet.flush()
        end
      end,
      function(failReason)
        ReplayNet.flushInFlight = false
        err("start failed:", tostring(failReason))
        requeueBatchFront()
      end
    )

  else
    -- EVENTS
    local url = urlJoin(ReplayNet.baseUrl, ReplayNet.eventsPath)
    local payload = {
      matchId = ReplayNet.matchId,
      token = ReplayNet.token,
      events = batch,
    }

    dbg("flush EVENTS", "matchId=" .. tostring(ReplayNet.matchId), "batch=" .. tostring(#batch))

    httpPostJson(url, payload,
      function(res)
        ReplayNet.flushInFlight = false

        -- server may just return { ok:true } or nothing; treat lack as ok
        if res and res.ok == false then
          err("events: server ok=false")
          requeueBatchFront()
          return
        end

        dbg("events uploaded ok", "sent=" .. tostring(#batch))

        if #ReplayNet.queue > 0 then
          ReplayNet.flush()
        end
      end,
      function(failReason)
        ReplayNet.flushInFlight = false
        err("events failed:", tostring(failReason))
        requeueBatchFront()
      end
    )
  end
end

function ReplayNet.startPeriodicFlush()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  local function periodic()
    if replay_log_enabled and not ReplayNet.finalized then
      ReplayNet.flush()
      Wait.time(periodic, 60)
    end
  end

  Wait.time(periodic, 60)
end


-- ------------------------------------------------------------
-- Finalize:
--  - Flush remaining events
--  - POST finalize { matchId, token }
--  - Receive { code } and broadcast it
-- ------------------------------------------------------------
function ReplayNet.finalizeAndGetCode()
  if not replay_log_enabled then return end
  if ReplayNet.finalized then
    dbg("finalize ignored (already finalized)")
    return
  end

  if not replay_log_enabled then
    dbg("finalize ignored (logging disabled)")
    return
  end

  ReplayNet.ensureStarted()

  -- Make best effort to flush first; then finalize after a short delay.
  ReplayNet.flush()

  Wait.time(function()
    if not (ReplayNet.matchId and ReplayNet.token) then
      err("cannot finalize: missing matchId/token")
      return
    end

    local url = urlJoin(ReplayNet.baseUrl, ReplayNet.finalizePath)
    local payload = {
      matchId = ReplayNet.matchId,
      token = ReplayNet.token,
    }

    dbg("FINALIZE", "matchId=" .. tostring(ReplayNet.matchId))

    httpPostJson(url, payload,
      function(res)
        if not res or (not res.Red and not res.Blue) then
          err("finalize: missing codes in response")
          if res then dbg("finalize response:", JSON.encode(res)) end
          return
        end

        ReplayNet.finalized = true
        for _, player_color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
          local code = tostring(res[player_color] or "")
          if code ~= "" then
            if Player[player_color].seated then
              broadcastToColor("[Replay] Each player got a code. Put your code in at dungeongui.de to claim and view your replay: " .. code, player_color, {0.9, 0.9, 0.9})
            end
          end
          dbg("finalized, code=", code)
        end
      end,
      function(failReason)
        err("finalize failed:", tostring(failReason))
      end
    )

  end, 0.5)
end

-- ============================================================
-- Example usage:
--   ReplayNet.log("DIE_PLACED_ON_CARD", player_color, {...}, "public")
--   ReplayNet.finalizeAndGetCode()
-- ============================================================


function onLoad()
  analyticsSessionID = os.time()
  sendAnalytics("load", Player["White"], nil)
  print("Type 'index cardname' to spawn a card with that name.")
  print("Type 'tutor cardname' to tutor a card with that name from your deck.")
  ReplayNet.startPeriodicFlush()
end

function toggleAnalytics(player,value,index)
  enableAnalytics = not enableAnalytics
  print("Analytics collected? - " .. tostring(enableAnalytics))
end

function onPlayerConect(player_id)
  player_id.promote()
end

function onPlayerDisconnect(player_id)
  sendAnalytics("disconnect", player_id, nil)
end

function getSnapPosition (mat, position)
  basic_position = deck_position[position]
  scale = mat.getScale()
  scaleFactor = scale.z / scale.x

  return {basic_position[1] * scaleFactor, basic_position[2], basic_position[3]}
end

card_rotations = {
  up = {0,0,0},
  right = {0,90,0},
  down = {0,180,0},
  left = {0,270,0}
}

function setMatSnapPoints(mat, scaleFactor)
  local inverseScale = 1 / (scaleFactor or 1)
  local snap_points = {
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "material"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "banishment"),
      rotation = card_rotations["left"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "main"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "graveyard"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "lesser_boon"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "greater_boon"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    }
  }

  local memory_start = -0.975 * inverseScale
  local memory_offset = 0.150 * inverseScale
  local memory_count = 14

  for memory_index = 0, memory_count - 1 do
    local memory_snap_point = {
      position = {
        memory_start + (memory_index * memory_offset),
        0,
        memory_row_z
      },
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      rotation_snap = true
    }
    table.insert(snap_points, memory_snap_point)
  end

  mat.setSnapPoints(snap_points)
  mat.interactable = false
end

function glimpse1(playerColor)

  local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main")
  if not deck then return end

  -- 1) Take the top card (index=0) off the deck,
  --    dropping it just above the deck so it spawns in view
  local spawnPos = deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2, 0)
  local card = deck.takeObject({
    index    = 0,
    position = spawnPos,
    smooth   = false
  })

  if card then
    Wait.condition(function()
      -- send it to the player’s hand (hand #2 here),
      -- then register it with the Encoder
      card.deal(1, playerColor, 2)
      Encoder.call("APIencodeObject", { obj = card })
      Encoder.call("APIobjEnableProp", { obj = card, propID = "πGlimpse" })

    end, function()
      return not card.spawning
    end)
  end
end

function isFourPlayerMode()
    local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
    if not redMat then return true end
    local posX = redMat.getPosition().x
    return posX < -10
end

function isStillSwitching()
  local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
  if not redMat then return true end
  return redMat.isSmoothMoving()
end

function toggleBigMat(player, value, index)
    local mat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not mat then return end

    local handzone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
    if not handzone then return end

    local currentScale = mat.getScale().x
    local newScale = 22 - currentScale
    mat.setScale({newScale, 1, newScale})

    local pos = handzone.getPosition()
    pos.z = (pos.z > 0) and 57-pos.z or -57-pos.z
    handzone.setPosition(pos)
end

function parseGMNotes(gmNotes)
    if not gmNotes or gmNotes == "" then
        return {}
    end

    local success, data = pcall(JSON.decode, gmNotes)
    if success and type(data) == "table" then
        return data
    end

    return {}
end

function setPlayuatOverlay(guid, newUrl)
    local mat = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    local data = mat.getCustomObject()
    data.face = newUrl
    mat.setCustomObject(data)
    Wait.condition(function() mat.reload() end,
    function() return not mat.isSmoothMoving() end)
end

function togglePlayerCount()

    if isStillSwitching() then
      print ("Wait for switching to finish first!")
      return
    end

    local playmat_overlay_url = isFourPlayerMode() and playmat_overlay_basic or playmat_overlay_pantheon

    local moveDistance = -20
    local hideDistance = -200
    local swapsidesDistance = -65
    shouldLock = false

    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      moveDistance = 20
      hideDistance = 200
      swapsidesDistance = 65
      shouldLock = true
    end

    print("[INFO] Switching between 2p/4p mode")

    moveObjectX(playmats.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playmatoverlays.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmatoverlays.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Blue, moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(preplacedquickactions.Red,  swapsidesDistance)
    moveObjectX(preplacedquickactions.Blue, moveDistance)

    for _, bagGUID in pairs(bags) do
        --moveObjectX(bagGUID, moveDistance)
    end

    moveObjectX(playmats.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Purple, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playmatoverlays.Green,   hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmatoverlays.Purple,  hideDistance)

    moveObjectXSnap(lifecounterslarge.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectXSnap(lifecounterslarge.Purple, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Purple, hideDistance)

    setPlayuatOverlay(playmatoverlays.Red, playmat_overlay_url)
    setPlayuatOverlay(playmatoverlays.Blue, playmat_overlay_url)
end

function moveObjectX(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos,false, false)
end

function moveObjectXSnap(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPosition(pos)
end

function moveObjectToX(guid, targetX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = targetX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function setObjectLock(guid, locked)
  local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
  Wait.condition(function() obj.setLock(locked) end,
  function() return obj and not obj.isDestroyed() and not obj.isSmoothMoving() and not obj.spawning end)
end

function toggleVisibility(player, id)
  visibility = Global.UI.getAttribute(id, "visibility")
  visible = visibility:find(player.color) ~= nil
  if visible then
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility:gsub("|" .. player.color, ""))
  else
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility .. "|" .. player.color)
  end
end

target_playmat_width = 35.6

function setPlaymatImage(player, imageUrl)
    local player_color = player.color
    local guid = playmats[player_color]
    local originalObj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not originalObj then
        print("No playmat found for color: " .. player_color)
        return
    end

    if imageUrl=="" then
      return
    end

    -- Update the image
    local custom = originalObj.getCustomObject()
    custom.image = imageUrl
    originalObj.setCustomObject(custom)
    originalObj.reload()

    -- Wait a bit for reload, then re-fetch by GUID
    Wait.time(function()

            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if not obj then
                print("Waiting for object to reload...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            local bounds = obj.getBounds().size
            local actualWidth = bounds.x
            if actualWidth == 0 then
                print("Bounds not ready yet...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            -- Rescale X to match target width
            local currentScale = obj.getScale()
            local scaleFactor = target_playmat_width / actualWidth
            obj.setScale({
                x = currentScale.x * scaleFactor,
                y = currentScale.y,
                z = currentScale.z
            })

            setMatSnapPoints(obj, scaleFactor)
            return true  -- Done
    end, 0.5)
end

extraDecks = {
    references = {},
    token = {},
    generated = {},
    mastery = {}
}
shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false

function spawnDeck(name, cards, player, as_bag)
    if name == "references" or name == "token" or name == "generated" or name == "mastery" then
        for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
            table.insert(extraDecks[name], card)
            shouldSpawnExtraDecks=true
        end
        return -- Delay spawning until all are gathered
    end

    if name == "extra" then
        local combined = {}
        for _, group in pairs(extraDecks) do
            for _, card in ipairs(group) do
                table.insert(combined, card)
            end
        end
        cards = combined
    end

    local playmatGUID = playmats[player.color]
    if(playmatGUID==nil) then
      playmatGUID = playmats["Red"]
    end
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)
    local rotation = playmat.getRotation()
    local position = playmat.positionToWorld(getSnapPosition(playmat, name))
    local bounds = playmat.getBounds()

    local deck = getDeck(name, cards, player)
    if as_bag or name == "extra" then
        deck = getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
    end

    deck.Transform = deck.Transform or {}
    deck.Transform.posX = position.x
    deck.Transform.posY = playmat.getPosition().y + bounds.size.y + bounds.offset.y + 1
    deck.Transform.posZ = position.z
    deck.Transform.rotY = rotation.y

    return spawnObjectData({data = deck})
end

function tableContains(table, value)
  for i = 1,#table do
    if (table[i]:lower() == value) then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

function getDeck(name, cards, player)
    global_offset = (global_offset % 30) + 1

    local main_sleeves = getSleeves(player)
    local material_sleeves = getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
    local sleeve = material_sleeves
    if name == "main" then
      sleeve = main_sleeves
    end


    local deckOffset = global_offset * 1000

    local deck_ids       = {}
    local custom_deck    = {}
    local contained_objs = {}

    local idx = 1
    for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
        local cardstomake = (card.quantity == 0 and 1) or (card.quantity or 1)

        for i = 1, cardstomake do
            local orientation = (card.orientation or ""):lower()
            local frontSide, backSide = nil, nil
            local hasOrientations = (type(card.orientations) == "table" and #card.orientations > 0)
            local isMultiState = false

            if hasOrientations then
                isMultiState = true
                local oppositeNeeded = (orientation == "front") and "back"
                    or (orientation == "back") and "front"
                    or nil

                if oppositeNeeded then
                    for b, alt in ipairs(card.orientations) do
                        if (alt.orientation==nil) or (type(alt.orientation) == "string"
                          and alt.orientation:lower() == oppositeNeeded) then
                            backSide = alt
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            local hasTypes = (type(card.types) == "table" and #(card.types) > 0)
            if hasTypes then
              if tableContains(card.types, "regalia") or tableContains(card.types, "champion") then
                sleeve = material_sleeves
              else
                sleeve = main_sleeves
              end
            end

            if orientation == "front" and backSide then
                frontSide = card

            elseif orientation == "back" and backSide then
                -- the user put the back side in their deck so we'll just flip it for them
                frontSide = backSide
                backSide  = card
            end

            if isMultiState then
                local frontKey    = (deckOffset + idx)
                local frontBackKey= frontKey + 1
                local frontID     = frontKey * 100
                local frontBackID = frontBackKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, frontID)


                local frontURL = frontSide.image or sleeve
                local backURL  = backSide.image  or sleeve

                local frontSideuuid = frontSide.uuid
                local entry = GA_EffectLibrary.call("getEntry", { slug = slugify(frontSide.name), orientation="front" })
                if not frontSideuuid then
                  if entry then
                    frontSideuuid = entry["default-uuid"]
                  else
                    frontSideuuid = frontSide.image -- last resort backup for non-uuid cards so they can still show in replays
                  end
                end

                local frontSidegmNotesExtraInfo = JSON.encode({
                  uuid = frontSideuuid,
                  image = frontSide.image,
                  owner = player.color,
                  ["home-deck"] = entry and entry["home-deck"] or name,
                  types = entry and entry["types"] or nil,
                  subtypes = entry and entry["subtypes"] or nil,
                })

                local entry = GA_EffectLibrary.call("getEntry", { slug = slugify(backSide.name), orientation="back" })
                local backSideuuid = backSide.uuid
                if not backSideuuid then
                  if entry then
                    backSideuuid = entry["default-uuid"]
                  else
                    backSideuuid = backSide.image -- backup for non-uuid cards so they can still show in replays
                  end
                end

                local backSidegmNotesExtraInfo = JSON.encode({
                  uuid = backSideuuid,
                  image = backSide.image,
                  owner = player.color,
                  ["home-deck"] = entry and entry["home-deck"] or name,
                  types = entry and entry["types"] or nil,
                  subtypes = entry and entry["subtypes"] or nil,
                })

                custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL .. "?format="..playformat,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = backURL,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = false,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    GMNotes = frontSidegmNotesExtraInfo,
                    Nickname = frontSide.name or "(NoName)",
                    CardID   = frontID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(frontKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)]
                    },
                    States = {
                        ["2"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            GMNotes = backSidegmNotesExtraInfo,
                            Nickname = frontSide.name .. " / " .. backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = frontBackID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(frontBackKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)]
                            }
                        }
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 3
            else
                local singleKey = deckOffset + idx
                local singleID  = singleKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, singleID)

                local entry = GA_EffectLibrary.call("getEntry", { slug = slugify(card.name), orientation="front" })
                local faceUrl = card.image or sleeve

                local uuid = card.uuid
                if not uuid then
                  if entry then
                    uuid = entry["default-uuid"]
                  else
                    -- Match shoutatyourdecks image URLs, ex:
                    -- https://shoutatyourdecks.com/images/angel-attendant-rdo.jpg
                    local shoutslug = card.image:match("^https?://shoutatyourdecks%.com/images/(.+)%.jpg$")
                    if shoutslug then
                      uuid = "shoutspoiler:" .. shoutslug
                    else
                      uuid = card.image -- backup for non-uuid cards so they can still show in replays
                    end
                  end
                end
                local gmNotesExtraInfo = JSON.encode({
                  uuid = uuid,
                  image = card.image,
                  owner = player.color,
                  ["home-deck"] = entry and entry["home-deck"] or name,
                  types = entry and entry["types"] or nil,
                  subtypes = entry and entry["subtypes"] or nil,
                })


                custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = faceUrl .. "?format="..playformat,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    GMNotes = gmNotesExtraInfo,
                    Nickname = card.name,
                    CardID   = singleID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(singleKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)]
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 1
            end
        end
    end

    if #contained_objs == 1 then
        contained_objs[1].Transform.rotZ = 180
        return contained_objs[1]
    else
        return {
            GUID = randomGUID(),
            Name = "Deck",
            Transform = {
                rotX = 360, rotY = 180, rotZ = 180,
                scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale
            },
            Nickname = name,
            DeckIDs = deck_ids,
            CustomDeck = custom_deck,
            ContainedObjects = contained_objs
        }
    end
end

function onAdjustChampionDamageRemote(params)
  ReplayNet.log("ADJUST_CHAMPION_DAMAGE", params.player_color, "public",
    { damage = params.new_score }, {})
end

function importDeckFromPlaymatRemote(params)
    for color, mat in pairs(playmats) do
      if mat == params.playmat.guid then
        params.player.changeColor(color)
        importDeck(Player[color], nil, nil, params.deck_text)
        params.playmat.call("ImportFinished", {})
      end
    end
end

function importDeck(player, value, index, deck_text)
    local deck_text = deck_text or ui_decklist_state[player.color]
    deck_text = trimSpaces(deck_text)

    if deck_text == "" then
        broadcastToColor("No Decklist URL provided!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^{") then
      local json = JSON.decode(deck_text)
      if json then
          if json.error == nil then
              SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
              return
          end
      end
    end

    if importDeckFromURL(deck_text, player, value, index) then
        return
    end    -- deck_text:match("^https?://")

    broadcastToColor("Invalid deck input! Provide a valid JSON decklist or a URL.", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function importDeckFromURL(deck_url, player, value, index)

  if deck_url ~= nil and deck_url:len() > 0 then
    if deck_url:sub(1, 4) ~= "http" then
      deck_url = "https://" .. deck_url
    end

    local site = ""
    if deck_url:find(DG_URL, 1, true) ~= nil then
      deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/deck/", "/json/")
      site = DG_URL
    elseif deck_url:find("silvie.org") ~= nil or deck_url:find("silv.ie") then
        if deck_url:find("format=json") == nil then
            if deck_url:find("?") == nil then
              deck_url = deck_url .. "?format=json"
            else
              deck_url = deck_url .. "&format=json"
            end
        end
        site = "silvie.org"
    elseif deck_url:find("shoutatyourdecks.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/decks/", "/api/")
        site = "shoutatyourdecks.com"
    elseif deck_url:find("silvie.gg") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist%?deck=", "silvie.gg/api/tts/export")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist/", "silvie.gg/api/tts/export")
        site = "silvie.gg"
    elseif deck_url:find("jsonblob.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("jsonblob.com/", "jsonblob.com/api/jsonBlob/")
        site = "jsonblob.com"
    elseif deck_url:find("tcgarchitect.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/decks/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/tournaments/decklists/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/tournament-deck/")
        site = "tcgarchitect.com"
    elseif deck_url:find("fractalofin.site") ~= nil then
        local event_id, player_id,suffix
        local patterns = {
            { pattern = "/player/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)", swap = true, suffix=""  }, -- player page
            { pattern = "#deck_(%d+)_(%d+)",             swap = false, suffix="" }, -- card/archetype page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)_topcut",    swap = false, suffix="_topcut" },  -- event page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)",    swap = false, suffix="" },  -- event page
        }

        for _, entry in ipairs(patterns) do
            local first, second = deck_url:match(entry.pattern)
            if first and second then
                player_id = entry.swap and tonumber(first) or tonumber(second)
                event_id = entry.swap and tonumber(second) or tonumber(first)
                suffix = entry.suffix
                break
            end
        end

        if event_id and player_id then
            deck_url = "https://fractalofin.site/tts/event_" .. event_id .. "/" .. player_id .. suffix .. ".json"
        else
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Fractalofin URL format!", player.color, {255,0,0})
            return
        end
        site = "fractalofin.site"
    else
        broadcastToColor("Invalid Decklist URL!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return false
    end

    WebRequest.get(deck_url, function(req)
      if req.is_error then
        log(req.error)
      else
        json = JSON.decode(req.text)
        if json.error ~= nil then
          log(json.error)
          if json.error == "silvie/bad-request" then
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Silvie.org Decklist!", player.color, {255,0,0})
          else
            broadcastToColor("Unknown Error :(", player.color, {255,0,0})
          end
          return false
        else
          decklist={
          }
          for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
            decklist[deck]={}
            for card, info in pairs(cards) do
              decklist[deck][info.uuid or slugify(info.name)]=
              {
                count=info.quantity,
                name=info.name
              }
            end
            if #cards > 0 then
              local obj = spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
              -- temporarily disabled
              if obj and deck:lower() == "main" then
                placeNotShuffledMarker(obj, player.color)
              end
            end
          end
          sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = site })
          ReplayNet.log("IMPORT_DECK", player.color, "private",
            { analyticdata = {site = site}, decklist=decklist}, {})
          if shouldSpawnExtraDecks then
            spawnDeck("extra", {}, player, true)
          end
          extraDecks = {
              references = {},
              token = {},
              generated = {},
              mastery = {}
          }
          shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false
          local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "main")
          deckcounts[player.color][2] = math.max(60, #mainDeck.getObjects())
          toggleImportLayout(player)
          getObjectFromGUID(playmatoverlays[player.color]).setGMNotes(JSON.encode(makeDeckSnapshotForReplay(player.color)))
        end
      end
    end)
    return true
  end
end



function spawnDeckRemote(payload)
    deck = SpawnDeckFromJson(payload.json, payload.player, 0, 0)
    if (payload.locationOverride) then deck.setPosition(payload.locationOverride) end
    if (payload.rotationOverride) then deck.setRotation(payload.rotationOverride) end
    return deck
end

function SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
  for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
    if #cards > 0 then
      return spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
    end
  end
end


cameraPositions2P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
}

cameraPositions4P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
    Green  = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Purple = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} }
}

function resetCamera(player, value, index)
    local player_color = player.color
    cameraPositions = cameraPositions2P
    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      cameraPositions = cameraPositions4P
    end

    local camData = cameraPositions[player_color]
    if camData then
        local player = nil
        for _, p in pairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
            if p.color == player_color then
                player = p
                break
            end
        end
        if not player then
            return
        end

        player.lookAt({
            position = camData.position,
            pitch = camData.rotation.x,
            yaw = camData.rotation.y,
            roll = camData.rotation.z
        })
    end
end

-- ================= BANISH QUEUE + REORGANIZE =================

banishQueue   = banishQueue   or {}
isBanishBusy  = isBanishBusy  or false

local function getMemoryZone(color)
  return getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[color])
end

local function getPlaymat(color)
  return getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
end

local function getMemoryCards(zone)
  local t = {}
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o.tag == "Card" and o.interactable then table.insert(t, o) end
  end
  return t
end

local function zoneHasDecks(zone)
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o.tag == "Deck" then return true end
  end
  return false
end

local function objectIsInZone(obj, zone)
  if not zone then return false end
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o == obj then return true end
  end
  return false
end

-- Wait until: (a) no Decks remain in the zone and (b) all cards are not smooth-moving
local function waitMemoryCalm(zone, cb)
  Wait.condition(cb, function()
    if zoneHasDecks(zone) then return false end
    for _, c in ipairs(getMemoryCards(zone)) do
      if c.isSmoothMoving() then return false end
    end
    return true
  end)
end

-- Only reorganize when there WERE stacks
local function reorganizeMemoryZoneOnly(color, done)
  local zone = getMemoryZone(color)
  if not zone then if done then done() end return end

  local hadDecks = zoneHasDecks(zone)
  if not hadDecks then
    if done then done() end
    return
  end

  splitDecksInZone(zone)

  -- brief delay for spawned singles, then lay out evenly and wait until calm
  Wait.time(function()
    local memPos      = zone.getPosition()
    local memoryCards = getMemoryCards(zone)
    reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, #memoryCards)

    waitMemoryCalm(zone, function()
      if done then done() end
    end)
  end, 0.2)
end


function performBanishRoulette(cardsInMemory, targetCard, onDone)
  local cfg = banishAnim or {
    enabled     = true,
    totalTime   = 0.6,
    flashTime   = 0.12,
    perStepMin  = 0.04,
    perStepMax  = 0.12,
    maxCards    = 30,
    colorAll    = {1.0, 0.9, 0.2},  -- yellow
    colorOut    = {1.0, 0.35, 0.35},-- red
    colorTarget = {0.35, 1.0, 0.55} -- green
  }

  if not cfg.enabled or #cardsInMemory <= 1 or #cardsInMemory > cfg.maxCards then
    if onDone then onDone() end
    return
  end

  -- Build elimination order (all non-targets, shuffled)
  local pool = {}
  for _, c in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do if c ~= targetCard then table.insert(pool, c) end end
  for i = #pool, 2, -1 do local j = math.random(i); pool[i], pool[j] = pool[j], pool[i] end

  local flashT  = cfg.flashTime or 0.12
  local steps   = #pool
  local budget  = math.max(0, (cfg.totalTime or 0.6) - flashT)
  local perStep = (steps > 0) and (budget / steps) or 0
  perStep       = math.max(cfg.perStepMin or 0.04, math.min(cfg.perStepMax or 0.12, perStep))
  local keepAll = flashT + steps * perStep + 0.25  -- keep yellow long enough to cover eliminations

  -- Stage A: keep EVERYONE yellow for the whole sequence
  for _, c in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
    if c and not c.isDestroyed() then c.highlightOn(cfg.colorAll, keepAll) end
  end

  -- Stage B: elimination — flash red then turn OFF each non-target
  Wait.time(function()
    for idx, c in ipairs(pool) do
      Wait.time(function()
        if c and not c.isDestroyed() then
          local pulse = math.max(0.06, perStep * 0.6)
          c.highlightOn(cfg.colorOut, pulse)
          Wait.time(function()
            if c and not c.isDestroyed() then c.highlightOff() end
          end, pulse)
        end
      end, (idx - 1) * perStep)
    end

    -- Stage C: crown the target, then finish
    Wait.time(function()
      if targetCard and not targetCard.isDestroyed() then
        -- If target was kept yellow, overwrite with a short green crown
        targetCard.highlightOn(cfg.colorTarget, 0.8)
      end
      if onDone then onDone() end
    end, steps * perStep + 0.02)

  end, flashT)
end


-- Actually move the selected card to banish
local function banishCardToZone(player_color, card)
  local mat = getPlaymat(player_color)
  if not (mat and card) then return end
  local banishPos = mat.positionToWorld(deck_position["banishment"])
  card.setPositionSmooth(banishPos)
  Wait.condition(function()
    ReplayNet.log("CARD_RANDOM_BANISHED", player_color, "public",
      {}, {card=card})
  end,
    function() return card and not card.isDestroyed() and not card.isSmoothMoving() end)
  card.setRotationSmooth(card_rotations["left"])
end

-- Process a single queued banish request
local function processNextBanish()
  if isBanishBusy then return end
  if #banishQueue == 0 then return end

  -- lock first to avoid races from multiple callers
  isBanishBusy = true
  local job = table.remove(banishQueue, 1)
  if not job then isBanishBusy = false; return end

  local color = job.color
  local zone  = getMemoryZone(color)
  if not zone then isBanishBusy = false; processNextBanish(); return end

  -- if there are stacks, split & re-layout; otherwise skip straight to pick
  local function afterReady()
    local cards = getMemoryCards(zone)
    if #cards == 0 then
      isBanishBusy = false
      processNextBanish()
      return
    end
    local target = cards[math.random(#cards)]
    performBanishRoulette(cards, target, function()
      banishCardToZone(color, target)
      isBanishBusy = false
      processNextBanish()
    end)
  end

  if zoneHasDecks(zone) then
    reorganizeMemoryZoneOnly(color, afterReady)
  else
    -- no decks; optionally ensure nothing is still moving
    Wait.condition(afterReady, function()
      for _, c in ipairs(getMemoryCards(zone)) do
        if c.isSmoothMoving() then return false end
      end
      return true
    end)
  end
end

-- Call this instead of the old banishOneMemoryCard body
function banishOneMemoryCard(player, value, index)
  table.insert(banishQueue, { color = player.color })
  processNextBanish()
end

  if(life_counter ~= nil) then
    life_counter.call("setValueRemote", {value=0, player_color=player_color})

function clearPlaymat(player, value, index)
    clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)
    clearSideboardAndExtra(player, value, index)
