function findPlayerZoneByNameRemote(packet)
  return findPlayerZoneByName(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function findPlayerZoneByName(player_color, name_fragment)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  if not playmat then return end

  local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())

  if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

  local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

  return targetPos
end

function classifyPlayerDeck(deck, player_color)
  for _, target_deck_name in ipairs({"main","graveyard","banishment","material"}) do
    deck_to_check = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, target_deck_name)
    if deck_to_check == deck then
      return target_deck_name
    end
  end
end

function findPlayerDeckByNameRemote(packet)
  return findPlayerDeckByName(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, name_fragment)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

    -- Try first by name matching
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        local pos = obj.getPosition()
        if obj.tag == "Deck" and obj.interactable
        and obj.getName():lower():find(name_fragment:lower())
        and isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
            return obj
        end
    end

    -- If no deck with matching name, fallback to position check

    local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())
    if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

    local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

    -- Find closest deck to the expected snap point
    local bestDeck = nil
    local bestDist = 1 -- usually like 0.3ish

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" or obj.tag == "Card" and obj.interactable then
          local p1 = obj.getPosition()
          local p2 = targetPos
          p1.y = 0
          p2.y = 0
          local dist = (p1 - p2):magnitude()
          if dist < bestDist then

              bestDeck = obj
              bestDist = dist
          end
        end
    end

    return bestDeck
end

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end

function placeNotShuffledMarker(obj, player_color)
  local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player_color]
  local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
  if marker then
    local playmatGUID = playmats[player_color]
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)

    if playmat then
      local rot = playmat.getRotation()
      marker.setRotation(rot)
      if(rot.y>90) then
        marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(6, 0, 0))
      else
        marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-6, 0, 0))
      end
    end

    marker.setName("Not Shuffled Marker")
    marker.setVar("ownerColor", player_color)
  end
end

function sendNotShuffledMarkersAway(player_color)

  local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player_color]
  local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
  local markerPos = marker.getPosition()
  if not marker then return end

  if (marker.getPosition().x>-100) then
    marker.setPosition(marker.getPosition() + Vector(-200, 0, 0))
  end
end

function onObjectRandomize(object, player_color)
    if object.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    sendNotShuffledMarkersAway(player_color)

    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
end

function onObjectLeaveContainer(container, leavingObject)
    if not leavingObject or leavingObject.tag ~= "Card" then return end
    local cardName      = (leavingObject.getName() or ""):lower()
    local containerName = (container.getName()     or ""):lower()

    if container ~= nil and container.tag == "Deck" then
      isSpiritAction = false
      local cardIsFaceUp = leavingObject.getRotation().z<90
      local containerIsFaceUp = container.getRotation().z<90
      if containerIsFaceUp then -- for champion stacks
        local visibledeckentry = getVisibleDeckEntry(container)
        if visibledeckentry ~= nil then
          local slugoverride = slugify(visibledeckentry.name)
          inscriptCardRulesText(container, slugoverride)
        end
      end
      if cardName:find("spirit of") and containerName:find("material") then
        for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
          matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")
          if matDeck == container then
            isSpiritAction = true

            if GA_DGCrystalRecorder then
              if REPLAY_STATE==0 then -- finalized
                ReplayNet.clear()
              end
              REPLAY_STATE=1 -- recording
              GA_DGCrystalRecorder.call("refreshReplayState")
            end

            sendAnalytics("playedSpirit", Player[color])
            sendDeckSnapshotForReplay(color)
            ReplayNet.log("SPIRIT_PLAYED", color, cardIsFaceUp and "public" or "private",
              { deck = container.getName()}, {card=leavingObject} )
          end
        end
      end
      if not isSpiritAction then
        for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
          if container == being_searched_decks[color] then
            for _, target_deck_name in ipairs({"main","graveyard","banishment","material"}) do
              deck_to_check = findPlayerDeckByName(color, target_deck_name)
              if deck_to_check == container then
                ReplayNet.log("CARD_TUTORED_FROM_DECK", color, cardIsFaceUp and "public" or "private",
                  { deck = target_deck_name }, {card=leavingObject})
              end
            end
          elseif container == findPlayerDeckByName(color, "main") or container == findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")  then
            ReplayNet.log("CARD_LEAVES_DECK", color, cardIsFaceUp and "public" or "private",
              { deck = container.getName() }, {card=leavingObject})
          end
        end
      end
    end
end

function getCardPositionWithinDeck(deck, card)
  if not deck or deck.tag ~= "Deck" or not card then
      return nil
  end

  local guid = card.getGUID()
  local objects = deck.getObjects()

  for i, entry in ipairs(objects) do
      if entry.guid == guid then
          return i, #objects
      end
  end

  return nil
end

function getOwnerColor(obj)
  for _, player_color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
    local minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat = getPlaymatBounds (player_color)
    if isPointInBounds(obj.getPosition(), minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat) then
      return player_color
    end
  end
end

card_home_deck_library = card_home_deck_library or {}

function recordCardHomeDeck(card, target_home_deck)
  if target_home_deck ~= "main" and target_home_deck ~= "material" then return end
  local home_deck = extractfromgmnotes(card, "home-deck")
  if home_deck ~= "sideboard" then return end

  local slug = slugify(card.getName())
  local uuid = extractfromgmnotes(card, "uuid")
  card_home_deck_library[slug] = target_home_deck
  card_home_deck_library[uuid] = target_home_deck
end

function tryObjectEnterContainer(container, enteringObject)
  if container.tag ~= "Deck" or enteringObject.tag ~= "Deck" then
    return true
  end

  local containerName = container.getName()
  local enteringName  = enteringObject.getName()

  -- Case A: main dropped onto packet
  if containerName == "" and (enteringName == "main" or enteringName == "material") then
    local mainCount = #enteringObject.getObjects()
    local packetCards = container.getObjects()

    for i, entry in ipairs(packetCards) do
      ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_DECK", getOwnerColor(enteringObject), "public",
        { deck = enteringName, position = mainCount + i }, { card = getObjectFromGUID(entry.guid) })
      recordCardHomeDeck(getObjectFromGUID(entry.guid), enteringName)
    end
    return true
  end

  -- Case B: packet dropped onto main
  if containerName == "main" or containerName == "material" then
    local sourceCards = enteringObject.getObjects()

    for i, entry in ipairs(sourceCards) do
      ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_DECK", getOwnerColor(container), "public",
        { deck = containerName, position = i }, { card = getObjectFromGUID(entry.guid) })
      recordCardHomeDeck(getObjectFromGUID(entry.guid), enteringName)
    end
  end

  return true
end

function setCardHomeDeck(card, homeDeck)
  if not card or card.tag ~= "Card" then return end

  local notes = card.getGMNotes()
  local data = {}

  if notes and notes ~= "" then
    data = parseGMNotes(notes) or {}
  end

  if data["home-deck"] == homeDeck then
    return -- already correct, avoid churn
  end

  data["home-deck"] = homeDeck
  card.setGMNotes(JSON.encode(data))
end

function onObjectEnterContainer(container, enteringObject)
  if container.tag == "Deck" and enteringObject.tag == "Deck" then
    local containerName = container.getName()
    local enteringName  = enteringObject.getName()

    if containerName == "" and enteringName ~= "" then
      container.setName(enteringName)
    end
  end
   if (container.tag == "Deck" and enteringObject.tag == "Card") then
      local isFaceUp = container.getRotation().z<90
      Wait.frames(function()

        local target_player_color = nil
        for _, player_color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
            local minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat = getPlaymatBounds (player_color)
            if isPointInBounds(container.getPosition(), minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat) then
                target_player_color = player_color
                for _, target_deck_name in ipairs({"main","graveyard","banishment","material","sideboard"}) do
                  deck_to_check = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, target_deck_name)
                  if deck_to_check == container then
                    recordCardHomeDeck(enteringObject, target_deck_name)
                    ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_DECK", player_color, isFaceUp and "public" or "private",
                     { deck=target_deck_name, position=getCardPositionWithinDeck(deck_to_check, enteringObject) }, {card=enteringObject})
                     local container_name = container.getName()
                     if not container_name:lower():find(target_deck_name) then
                         container.setName(container_name .. target_deck_name)
                     end
                    return
                  end
                end
            end
        end

        if target_player_color then
          local fieldGUID = playerfields[target_player_color]
          local isInFieldZone = objectIsInZone(container, getObjectFromGUID(fieldGUID))
          if isFaceUp and isInFieldZone then
            local visibleCard = getVisibleDeckEntry(container)
            local slugoverride = slugify(visibleCard.name)
            inscriptCardRulesText(container, slugoverride)
            ReplayNet.log("CARD_ADDED_TO_STACK", target_player_color, "public",
              {stack_guid = container.guid}, {card=enteringObject})
          end
        end
      end, 1)

   end
end

function extractfromgmnotes(obj, key)
  if not obj then return nil end

  local notes = nil

  if type(obj) == "userdata" and obj.getGMNotes then
    notes = obj.getGMNotes()

  elseif type(obj) == "table" then
    notes = obj.gm_notes
  end

  if not notes or notes == "" then return nil end

  local gmnotes = parseGMNotes(notes)
  return gmnotes[key]
end

local function getCardName(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end

  if type(obj) == "userdata" and obj.getName then
    local name = obj.getName()
    return (name ~= "") and name or nil

  elseif type(obj) == "table" then
    local name = obj.nickname or obj.name
    return (name and name ~= "") and name or nil
  end

  return nil
end

local function getCardIdAndFields(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end

  local uuid = extractfromgmnotes(obj, "uuid")
  local image = extractfromgmnotes(obj, "image")
  local home_deck = extractfromgmnotes(obj, "home-deck")
  local name = getCardName(obj)

  if (not uuid or uuid == "") and (not name or name == "") then
    return nil
  end

  local id = nil
  if uuid and uuid ~= "" then
    id = uuid
  else
    id = slugify(name)
  end

  return id, uuid, name, image, home_deck
end

local function bump(out, id, uuid, name, image, home_deck)
  local cur = out[id]
  if not cur then
    out[id] = {
      name = name,
      uuid = uuid,
      image = image,
      ["home-deck"] = home_deck,
      count = 1
    }
    return
  end

  cur.count = cur.count + 1
  if not cur.uuid and uuid then cur.uuid = uuid end
  if not cur.name and name then cur.name = name end
  if not cur.image and image then cur.image = image end
  if not cur["home-deck"] and home_deck then cur["home-deck"] = home_deck end
end

local function accumulateFromObject(obj, out)
  if not obj then return end

  if obj.tag == "Deck" then
    for _, entry in ipairs(obj.getObjects()) do
      local id, uuid, name, image, home_deck = getCardIdAndFields(entry)
      if id then
        bump(out, id, uuid, name, image, home_deck)
      end
    end

  elseif obj.tag == "Card" then
    local id, uuid, name, image, home_deck = getCardIdAndFields(obj)
    if id then
      bump(out, id, uuid, name, image, home_deck)
    end
  end
end


local function collectLooseMaterialCards(player_color, out)
  local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.interactable then
      if isPointInBounds(obj.getPosition(), minBound, maxBound) then
        local id, uuid, name, image, home_deck = getCardIdAndFields(obj)
        if id then
          bump(out, id, uuid, name, image, home_deck)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

function makeDeckSnapshotForReplay(playerColor)
  local decklist = {
    main = {},
    material = {},
    sideboard = {},
  }

  accumulateFromObject(findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main"), decklist.main)
  accumulateFromObject(findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "material"), decklist.material)
  accumulateFromObject(findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "sideboard"), decklist.sideboard)

  collectLooseMaterialCards(playerColor, decklist.material)
  return decklist
end

function sendDeckSnapshotForReplay(playerColor)
  local decklist = makeDeckSnapshotForReplay(playerColor)
  local new_decklist = {}
  for deck_name, deck in pairs(decklist) do
    decklist[deck_name] = {}
    for card_key, card in pairs(deck) do
      decklist[deck_name][card_key] =
      {
        name = card.name,
        count = card.count
      }
    end
  end
  ReplayNet.log("DECK_SNAPSHOT", playerColor, "private", {
    decklist = decklist
  }, {})
end


local function readDeckSnapshotFromOverlay(playerColor)
  local overlay = getObjectFromGUID(playmatoverlays[playerColor])
  if not overlay then return nil end

  local notes = overlay.getGMNotes()
  if not notes or notes == "" then return nil end

  return JSON.decode(notes)
end

local function flattenSnapshot(snapshot)
  local out = {}

  for _, zone in ipairs({"main","material","sideboard"}) do
    for id, entry in pairs(snapshot[zone] or {}) do
      local cur = out[id]
      if not cur then
        out[id] = {
          name          = entry.name,
          uuid          = entry.uuid,
          image         = entry.image,
          count         = entry.count,
          ["home-deck"] = entry["home-deck"]
        }
      else
        cur.count = cur.count + entry.count
      end
    end
  end

  return out
end



local function flattenLiveDeck(obj)
  local out = {}
  accumulateFromObject(obj, out)

  -- normalize to {id={name,uuid,count}}
  local norm = {}
  for id, entry in pairs(out) do
    norm[id] = {
      name  = entry.name,
      uuid  = entry.uuid,
      image = entry.image,
      ["home-deck"] = entry["home-deck"],
      count = entry.count,
    }
  end

  return norm
end


local function subtractSets(a, b)
  local out = {}

  for id, entry in pairs(a) do
    local remaining = entry.count - (b[id] and b[id].count or 0)
    if remaining > 0 then
      out[id] = {
        name  = entry.name,
        uuid  = entry.uuid,
        image = entry.image,
        ["home-deck"] = entry["home-deck"],
        count = remaining
      }
    end
  end

  return out
end


local function toSpawnDeckCards(set)
  local cards = {}

  for _, entry in pairs(set) do
    table.insert(cards, {
      name     = entry.name,
      uuid     = entry.uuid,
      image    = entry.image,
      quantity = entry.count
    })
  end

  return cards
end

local function resolveHomeDeck(id, snapshotEntry)
  if snapshotEntry and snapshotEntry["home-deck"] and snapshotEntry["home-deck"] ~= "sideboard" then
    return snapshotEntry["home-deck"]
  end

  if card_home_deck_library and card_home_deck_library[id] then
    return card_home_deck_library[id]
  end

  return nil
end


function computeResetDecksFromSnapshot(playerColor)
  local snapshot = readDeckSnapshotFromOverlay(playerColor)
  if not snapshot then return nil end

  local original = flattenSnapshot(snapshot)

  local sideboardObj = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "sideboard")
  local liveSideboard = flattenLiveDeck(sideboardObj)

  -- remove live sideboard cards
  local remaining = subtractSets(original, liveSideboard)

  local mainSet = {}
  local materialSet = {}

  for id, entry in pairs(remaining) do
    local home = resolveHomeDeck(id, entry)

    if home == "main" then
      mainSet[id] = {
        name  = entry.name,
        uuid  = entry.uuid,
        image = entry.image,
        count = entry.count
      }

    elseif home == "material" then
      materialSet[id] = {
        name  = entry.name,
        uuid  = entry.uuid,
        image = entry.image,
        count = entry.count
      }

    -- else: unknown → stays unspawned / sideboard
    end
  end

  return {
    main     = toSpawnDeckCards(mainSet),
    material = toSpawnDeckCards(materialSet)
  }
end


function deckDiffSpawn(player, value, button_id)
  local reset_decks = computeResetDecksFromSnapshot(player.color)

  resetLifeCounter(player.color)
  clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)

  spawnDeck("material", reset_decks["material"], player, false)
  spawnDeck("main", reset_decks["main"], player, false)
end

lastResetTimes = {
  Red = 0,
  Blue = 0,
  Green = 0,
  Purple = 0
}

rebounceProtectionTime = 60

function resetToGameStart(player, value, index)

    local now = os.time()
    if lastResetTimes[player.color] and now - lastResetTimes[player.color] > rebounceProtectionTime then
      sendAnalytics("GG Go Next", player.color)
      lastResetTimes[player.color] = now
    end

    local reset_decks = computeResetDecksFromSnapshot(player.color)

    resetLifeCounter(player.color)
    clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)

    local materialDeck = spawnDeck("material", reset_decks["material"], player, false)
    local mainDeck = spawnDeck("main", reset_decks["main"], player, false)

    performResetFlourish(player, materialDeck, card_back)
    performResetFlourish(player, mainDeck, card_back)

    if GA_DGCrystalRecorder then
      REPLAY_STATE=2 -- Attract
      GA_DGCrystalRecorder.call("refreshReplayState")
    end

    ReplayNet.log("GG_GO_NEXT", player.color, "public",
      {}, {})
end

function performResetFlourish(player, deck, sleeve_url)
    if not deck or deck.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    local count = #deck.getObjects()
    if count < 3 then return end

    local center = deck.getPosition()
    local radius = 5
    local fixedCount = 12
    local angleStep = (2 * math.pi) / fixedCount

    local total = math.min(count, 30)
    local cardsToAnimate = total - 2
    local animDuration = 0.5
    local delayPerCard = animDuration / cardsToAnimate

    for i = 1, cardsToAnimate do
        local angle = angleStep * i
        local offset = Vector(math.cos(angle) * radius, 2, math.sin(angle) * radius)
        local delay = (i - 1) * delayPerCard

        Wait.time(function()
            local ghost = spawnObject({
                type = "Card",
                position = center + offset,
                rotation = {0, 0, 180},
                scale = {0.95, 0.95, 0.95},
                sound = false,
                gm_notes = "Reset-Flourish"
            })

            if ghost then
                ghost.setCustomObject({
                  face = sleeve_url,
                  back = sleeve_url
                })

                ghost.setLock(true)
                ghost.setDescription("")
                ghost.setName("Reset-Flourish")

                Wait.time(function()
                    ghost.setPositionSmooth(center + Vector(0, 2 + i * 0.1, 0), false, true)
                end, 0.2)

                Wait.time(function()
                    if ghost then ghost.destruct() end
                end, 1.0)
            end
        end, delay)
    end
end


function clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
  if not playmat then return end

  local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player.color)
  destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)

  -- destroy anything in *all* of their hand zones (hand 1 and hand 2)
  local p = Player[player.color]
  for handIdx = 1, p.getHandCount() do
    for _, obj in ipairs(p.getHandObjects(handIdx) or {}) do
      obj.destruct()
    end
  end
end

function getBoundsOfDeckZone (player_color, zoneName)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  local localPos = getSnapPosition(playmat, zoneName)

  if playmat and localPos then

      local worldPos = playmat.positionToWorld(localPos)

      local halfSizeX = 2.0
      local halfSizeY = 2.0
      local halfSizeZ = 2.0

      local minBound = Vector(worldPos.x - halfSizeX, worldPos.y - halfSizeY, worldPos.z - halfSizeZ)
      local maxBound = Vector(worldPos.x + halfSizeX, worldPos.y + halfSizeY, worldPos.z + halfSizeZ)

      return minBound, maxBound

  end
end

function clearSideboardAndExtra(player, value, index)
  local additional_zones_to_clear = {
    "sideboard", "extra"
  }
  for _, zoneName in ipairs(additional_zones_to_clear) do
      local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone( player.color, zoneName )
      if minBound then
        destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
      end
  end
end

function getEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
  local listOfThings = {}
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do

      local pos = obj.getPosition()
      local tag = obj.tag

      -- Check if the object is inside the playmat's area
      if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
          -- Delete only specific object types
          if tag == "Card" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "Infinite" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Deck" or tag == "GoPiece" then
              if obj.interactable then
                listOfThings.append(obj)
              end
          end
      end
  end
  return listOfThings
end

function destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
  -- Iterate through all objects and delete only cards, dice, and tokens
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do

      local pos = obj.getPosition()
      local tag = obj.tag

      -- Check if the object is inside the playmat's area
      if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
          -- Delete only specific object types
          if tag == "Card" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "Infinite" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Deck" or tag == "GoPiece" then
              if obj.interactable then
                obj.destroy()
              end
          end
      end
  end
end

function getPlaymatBounds(color)
  local mat    = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
  local b, c   = mat.getBounds(), mat.getPosition()
  local hx, hy, hz = b.size.x/2, 50, b.size.z/2
  return Vector(c.x - hx, c.y - hy, c.z - hz), Vector(c.x + hx, c.y + hy, c.z + hz)
end

function wakeUpEverythingOnPlaymat(player, value, index)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds (player.color)
    local minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish = getBoundsOfDeckZone (player.color, "banishment")

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.interactable or obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local pos = obj.getPosition()

            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) and not isPointInBounds(pos, minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish) then

                local rot = obj.getRotation()
                local isFaceDown = isCardFaceDown(obj)

                local newRot = {
                    x = playmat.getRotation().x,
                    y = playmat.getRotation().y,
                    z = isFaceDown and 180 or 0
                }

                obj.setRotationSmooth(newRot)
            end
        end
    end

    ReplayNet.log("WAKE_UP_EVERYTHING", player_color, "public",
     {}, {})
end

function isPointInBounds(point, minBound, maxBound)

  return point.x >= minBound.x and point.x <= maxBound.x and
     point.y >= minBound.y and point.y <= maxBound.y and
     point.z >= minBound.z and point.z <= maxBound.z
end

function revealRandomMemoryCard(player, value, index)

  local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
  local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color ..  " is nil.") return end

  local memoryCards = 0
  local memoryCheck = 0

  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" and item.interactable then
        local rot = item.getRotation()
        if math.abs(item.getRotation().z) > 90 then
            memoryCards=memoryCards+1
        end
      end
    end
 end

 if memoryCards == 0 then
   log("No Face Down Cards in Memory")
 else
    randomCard = math.random(memoryCards)
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" and item.interactable then
        if math.abs(item.getRotation().z) > 90 then
          memoryCheck = memoryCheck + 1
          if memoryCheck == randomCard then
            item.flip()
            log("Player " .. player.color .. " revealed a card at random: " .. item.name)
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

function millTopCard(player, value, index)
  local playerColor= player.color
  local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main")
  if not deck then return end
  local gravPos = findPlayerZoneByName( playerColor, "graveyard" )
  local target  = {x=gravPos.x, y=3, z=gravPos.z}

  local spawnPos = deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2, 0)
  local card = deck.takeObject({
    index    = 0,
    position = spawnPos,
    smooth   = false
  })
  local cardPosition = card.getPosition()

  local midTarget  = {x=(gravPos.x+cardPosition.x)/2, y=6, z=(gravPos.z+cardPosition.z)/2}

  local cardRot = card.getRotation()
  cardRot.z = 0
  card.setRotationSmooth(cardRot,false,true)
  Wait.time(function() card.setPositionSmooth(midTarget,false,true) end, 0.2)
  Wait.time(function() card.setPositionSmooth(target,false,true) end, 0.5)
  ReplayNet.log("CARD_FLIPPED", player.color, "public",
    {faceup=true}, { card=card })
end

function reorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local cardsInMemory = {}

    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.interactable then
            table.insert(cardsInMemory, obj)
        end
    end

    local count = #cardsInMemory
    if count == 0 then return end

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing  -- distance for 7 cards is 6 * 3.2 = 19.2
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and -1 or 1
    local initial = (memPos.z > 0) and -9.5 or 9.5

    -- if count <= 7, use normal spacing; else shrink spacing so they all fit within the same total width
    local effectiveSpacing
    if count <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (count - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        -- place them from left to right
        local offset = i - 1
        local finalPos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + (offset * effectiveSpacing),
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-- Helper: split any Deck in the zone into single cards, laid out in a line
function splitDecksInZone(zone)
    local pos = zone.getPosition()
    for _, obj in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local contents = obj.getObjects() or {}
            local n        = #contents
            if n > 0 then
                local spacing = 0.6                       -- distance between cards
                local startX  = pos.x - spacing*(n-1)/2  -- center the line
                for i = 1, n do
                    local x = startX + (i-1)*spacing
                    obj.takeObject({
                        index    = 1,
                        position = { 4*x, pos.y + 2, pos.z+0.5 },
                        smooth   = false
                    })
                end
            end
            obj.destruct()
        end
    end
end

function reserveAndReorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    -- 1) get the memory zone
    local memZone = getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[player.color])
    if not memZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- 2) split any decks into cards
    splitDecksInZone(memZone)

    -- 3) wait a moment for those new cards to appear
    Wait.time(function()
        local memPos = memZone.getPosition()

        -- 4) gather all cards now in memory
        local memoryCards = {}
        for _, o in ipairs(memZone.getObjects()) do
            if o.tag == "Card" and o.interactable then
                table.insert(memoryCards, o)
            end
        end
        local memCount = #memoryCards

        -- 5) find face-down cards in hand
        local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
        if not handZone then
            log("Hand Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
            return
        end
        local cardsToMove = {}
        for _, c in ipairs(handZone.getObjects() or {}) do
            if c.tag == "Card" and c.interactable and math.abs(c.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                table.insert(cardsToMove, c)
            end
        end
        local handCount = #cardsToMove

        -- 6) compute total and reorganize existing memory
        local totalCount = memCount + handCount
        reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, totalCount)

        -- 7) if no new cards, we’re done
        if handCount == 0 then
            return
        end

        -- 8) otherwise wait a bit more, then move the new cards in place
        Wait.time(function()
            for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
                local offset   = memCount + (i - 1)
                local finalPos = getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, totalCount)

                -- quick mid-air reposition
                local cp = card.getPosition()
                card.setPosition({
                    x = (cp.x + finalPos.x) / 2,
                    y = (cp.y + finalPos.y + 40) / 2,
                    z = (cp.z + finalPos.z) / 2,
                })
                card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
                local faceup = not isCardFaceDown(card)

                Wait.condition(function()
                  ReplayNet.log("CARD_DROPPED_MEMORY", player.color, faceup and "public" or "private",
                    {}, { card=card })
                 end,
                  function() return card and not card.isDestroyed() and not card.isSmoothMoving() end)
            end
        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.2)
end


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Reorganize existing memory cards for a future total
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function reorganizeMemoryForTotal(cardsInMemory, memPos, futureTotal)
    if #cardsInMemory == 0 then return end

    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    table.sort(cardsInMemory, function(a, b)
      return a.getPosition().x*spacingSign < b.getPosition().x*spacingSign
    end)

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local ySpacing = 0.05
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing


    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    -- same centered layout logic
    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initial = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    local yPos = memPos.y + 1
    local zPos = memPos.z

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        local offset = (i - 1)
        local finalPos = {
            x = initial + offset * effectiveSpacing,
            y = yPos + offset * ySpacing,
            z = zPos
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Calculate final position for a new card offset
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, futureTotal)
    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initialX = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    return {
        x = initialX + offset * effectiveSpacing,
        y = memPos.y + 2,
        z = memPos.z
    }
end


function recollectMemory(player, value, index)

  local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
  local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color ..  " is nil.") return end


  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" and item.interactable then
        item.deal(1,player.color)
      elseif item.tag == "Deck" and item.interactable then
        item.deal(99, player.color)
      end
    end
  end

end

function transformCardWhenStable(obj, newState, thenFn)
  if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return end

  local newObj

  local function stable(o)
    return o
      and not o.isDestroyed()
      and not o.isSmoothMoving()
      and not o.spawning
  end

  local function afterSettled()
    if thenFn then thenFn(newObj) end
  end

  local cur = obj.getStateId()
  if cur ~= newState then
    newObj = obj.setState(newState)
    -- First: wait for state to actually change + settle
    Wait.condition(function()
     -- After condition succeeds, do side effects
      Wait.time(function()
        waitUntilStable(newObj, function()
          inscriptCardRulesText(newObj)
          afterSettled()
        end)
      end, 0.05)
    end, function()
      return stable(newObj) and newObj.getStateId() == newState
    end)
  end
end



function getLastStateIndex(obj)
  local states = obj.getStates()
  if states ~= nil then
    return #states+1
  end
  return 1
end

local function hasGameplayObjectOnPlaymat(player_color)
  local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.interactable then
      local tag = obj.tag
      if tag == "Card" or tag == "Deck" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "GoPiece" or tag == "Infinite" then
        if isPointInBounds(obj.getPosition(), minBound, maxBound) then
          return true
        end
      end
    end
  end

  return false
end


function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
  if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" or (obj.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" ) then return end
  for player_color, z in pairs(playerhandzones) do
    if zone == getObjectFromGUID(z) then
      if hasGameplayObjectOnPlaymat(player_color) then
        ReplayNet.log("CARD_LEAVES_HAND", player_color, "private",
          {}, { card=obj })
      end
    end
  end
  if obj.getStateId() == getLastStateIndex(obj) then
    if zone.getName() == "Field" then
      for player_color, z in pairs(playerfields) do
        if zone == getObjectFromGUID(z) then
          if not obj.isDestroyed() then
            local lastIdx = getLastStateIndex(obj)
            if lastIdx and lastIdx > 1 and obj.getStateId() > 1 then
              transformCardWhenStable(obj, 1, function(newObject)
                ReplayNet.log("CARD_TRANSFORMED", player_color, "public",
                  {orientation="front"}, {card=newObject})
              end)
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

function isCardFaceDown(card)
  if not card then return false end
  local rot = card.getRotation()
  return rot.z > 90 and rot.z < 270
end


cachedCardJson = {}
allowPullFromIndex = true

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end

local function subjectCardName(obj)
  local name = obj.getName() or ""
  local front, back = name:match("^%s*(.-)%s*/%s*(.-)%s*$")
  if not front then
    return name, "front" -- single-sided (or already a clean name)
  end
  -- In your table: z ~ 0 => face-down, z ~ 180 => face-up
  local isFaceDown = isCardFaceDown(obj)
  return isFaceDown and back, "back" or front, "front"
end

local function inscriptWhenStable(o)
  Wait.condition(function() inscriptCardRulesText(o) end,
    function() return o and not o.isDestroyed() and not o.isSmoothMoving() and not o.spawning end)
end

function inscriptCardRulesText(obj, slugoverride)
  local name, orientation = slugoverride or subjectCardName(obj)
  local slug = slugify(name)

  local ok, effect = pcall(function()
    return GA_EffectLibrary and GA_EffectLibrary.call("getEntry", { slug = slug, orientation = orientation })["effect"]
  end)
  if ok and effect and obj and not obj.isDestroyed() then
    pcall(function() obj.setDescription(effect) end)
  end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if not (obj.tag == "Card" or obj.tag == "Deck") then return end
    if obj.getName() == "Reset-Flourish" then return end
    if not obj.hasTag("StatusToken") then
        if obj.tag == "Card" and zone.getName() == "MaterialDeckZone" and obj.getStateId() ~= 1 then
          for player_color, z in pairs(playermaterialdeckzones) do
            if zone == getObjectFromGUID(z) then
              local lastIdx = getLastStateIndex(obj)
              if lastIdx and lastIdx > 1 and obj.getStateId() > 1 then
                transformCardWhenStable(obj, 1, function(newObject)
                  ReplayNet.log("CARD_TRANSFORMED", player_color, "public",
                    {orientation="front"}, {card=newObject})
                end)
              end
            end
          end
        end
        if zone.getName() == "Field" then
          Encoder.call("APIencodeObject", { obj = obj })
        end
    end

    if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return end

    local faceup = not isCardFaceDown(obj)
    local gm_notes = parseGMNotes(obj.getGMNotes())

    local colors_to_iterate = isFourPlayerMode() and {"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"} or {"Red", "Blue"}

    for _, color in ipairs(colors_to_iterate) do
      if zone.guid == playerhandzones[color] then
        ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_HAND", color, "private",
          { faceup = faceup },{card = obj} )
      elseif zone.guid == playerglimpsezones[color] then
        ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_PEEK", color, "private",
          { faceup = faceup },{card = obj} )
      elseif zone.guid == playerfields[color] and obj.getVelocity() == vector(0, 0, 0) then -- Hack to detect direct drops T-T
        if gm_notes.spawned then
            -- do nothing for now -the card was not tutored, it was spawned.
        elseif obj.getStateId()>1 then
            -- do nothing, the card was not tutoried, it was state swapped
        else
            ReplayNet.log("CARD_TUTORED_TO_FIELD", color, "private",
              { faceup = faceup },{card = obj} )
        end
      end
    end



end

local function findCardUnderObject(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end

  local hits = Physics.cast({
    origin       = obj.getPosition() + Vector(0, 0.2, 0),
    direction    = {0, -1, 0},
    max_distance = 7,
    type         = 3, -- box
    size         = {.4, 0.2, .4},
    debug        = true,
  })

  local best = nil
  local bestY = -math.huge

  for _, hit in ipairs(hits) do
    local hitObj = hit.hit_object
    if hitObj
      and hitObj.tag == "Card"
      and hitObj.interactable
      and not hitObj.is_face_down
      and hitObj.getPosition().y < obj.getPosition().y
    then
      local y = hitObj.getPosition().y
      if y > bestY then
        best = hitObj
        bestY = y
      end
    end
  end
  return best
end

local tokensLastCards = {}

function waitUntilPhysicsSettled(obj, thenFn)
  if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return end

  local stillFrames = 0

  Wait.condition(
    function()
      thenFn(obj)
    end,
    function()
      if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return false end
      if not obj.getVelocity then return false end

      local v = obj.getVelocity()
      if v and v:magnitude() < 0.01 then
        stillFrames = stillFrames + 1
      else
        stillFrames = 0
      end

      return stillFrames >= 3
    end
  )
end

function onObjectDrop(player_color, droppedObject)
    -- First: if they dropped a Quick Actions Panel itself, ignore
    if droppedObject.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
        return
    end

    if droppedObject.tag == "Dice"then
      local card = findCardUnderObject(droppedObject)
      if not card then
        if tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] then
          local card = getObjectFromGUID(tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid])
          if not card then return end
          local object_guid   = droppedObject.guid
          ReplayNet.log("DIE_REMOVED_FROM_CARD", player_color, "public",
            {die_guid=object_guid}, {card=card} )
          tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] = nil
        end
      return end
      local object_guid   = droppedObject.guid
      ReplayNet.log("DIE_PLACED_ON_CARD", player_color, "public",
        {die_guid=object_guid, value=droppedObject.getValue(), identity=droppedObject.getName() }, { card=card })
      tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] = card.guid
    end

    if droppedObject.tag == "GoPiece" or droppedObject.hasTag("StatusToken") then
      local card = findCardUnderObject(droppedObject)
      if not card then
        if tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] then
          local card = getObjectFromGUID(tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid])
          if not card then return end
          ReplayNet.log("MARKER_REMOVED_FROM_CARD", player_color, "public",
            { marker_guid = droppedObject.guid }, { card = card })
          tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] = nil
        end
        return
      end
      ReplayNet.log("MARKER_PLACED_ON_CARD", player_color, "public",
        { marker_guid = droppedObject.guid, identity=droppedObject.getName() }, {card=card})
      tokensLastCards[droppedObject.guid] = card.guid
      return
    end

    -- Bottoming cards or decks
    if droppedObject.tag == "Card" or droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        local name = droppedObject.getName()
        local rotation = droppedObject.getRotation()
        local fieldGUID = playerfields[player_color]
        if not fieldGUID then return end
        if name ~= "Reset-Flourish" and rotation.z<90 and objectIsInZone(droppedObject, getObjectFromGUID(fieldGUID)) then
          inscriptWhenStable(droppedObject)
        end
        for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
            if obj.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
                if obj.getScale().x ~= 1.0 then
                    local quickBottomPosition = obj.positionToWorld({-2.8,0,0})
                    local distance = (droppedObject.getPosition() - quickBottomPosition):magnitude()
                    if distance < 3.3 then
                        handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
                        return
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Auto-rename decks dropped onto playmat --- do this part for main, GY, banishment, and materialm,
    if droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
      for _, zone in ipairs({"main","graveyard","banishment","material"}) do
        local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone(player_color, zone)
        local pos = droppedObject.getPosition()
        if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
            local name = droppedObject.getName()
            if not name:lower():find(zone) then
                droppedObject.setName(name .. zone)
            end
        end
      end
    end

    -- CARD ONLY FROM HERE
    if (droppedObject.tag ~= "Card") then return end -- and (obj.tag ~= "Deck")

    waitUntilPhysicsSettled(droppedObject, function(resultObj)

        local faceup = not isCardFaceDown(resultObj)

        -- otherwise, card still exists → check memory
        local playermemoryzone = getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[player_color])
        if playermemoryzone and objectIsInZone(resultObj, playermemoryzone) then
          ReplayNet.log("CARD_DROPPED_MEMORY", player_color, faceup and "public" or "private",
            {faceup=faceup}, {card=resultObj})
          return
        end

        -- check field
        local is_transformed = resultObj.getStates() and resultObj.getStateId() > 1

        local playerfield = getObjectFromGUID(playerfields[player_color])
        if playerfield and objectIsInZone(resultObj, playerfield) then
          ReplayNet.log("CARD_DROPPED_FIELD", player_color, (faceup or is_transformed) and "public" or "private",
            {faceup=faceup}, {card=resultObj})
          return
        end

        --Is it the first card in a new deck?
        local deck_name = classifyPlayerDeck(resultObj, player_color)
        if deck_name then
          ReplayNet.log("CARD_ENTERS_DECK", player_color, faceup and "public" or "private",
           { deck=deck_name, position=1 }, {card=resultObj})
          return
        end

      end)

end

function onObjectDestroy(destroyedObject)
  for _, player_color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
    local minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat = getPlaymatBounds (player_color)
    if isPointInBounds(destroyedObject.getPosition(), minBoundPlaymat, maxBoundPlaymat) then
      if destroyedObject.tag == "Dice"then
        local card = getObjectFromGUID(tokensLastCards[destroyedObject.guid])
        if not card then return end
        local object_guid   = destroyedObject.guid
        ReplayNet.log("DIE_REMOVED_FROM_CARD", player_color, "public",
          { die_guid=object_guid}, {card=card})
        tokensLastCards[destroyedObject.guid] = nil
      end
      if destroyedObject.tag == "GoPiece" or destroyedObject.hasTag("StatusToken") then
        local card = findCardUnderObject(destroyedObject)
        if not card then return end
        local object_guid   = destroyedObject.guid
        ReplayNet.log("MARKER_REMOVED_FROM_CARD", player_color, "public",
          { marker_guid=object_guid }, {card=card})
        tokensLastCards[destroyedObject.guid] = nil
      end
    end
  end
end

function handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
    local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    local deckPos = nil
    if deck then
        deckPos = deck.getPosition()
    else
        broadcastToColor("Cannot find your main deck - making a new one!", player_color, {0.8,0.8,0.8})
        deckPos = findPlayerZoneByName(player_color, "main")
    end

    if droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
      for _, card in ipairs(droppedObject.getObjects()) do
        if card then
          ReplayNet.log("CARD_RECYCLE", player_color, "public",
            {}, { card=card })
        end
      end
    else
        if slug then
          ReplayNet.log("CARD_RECYCLE", player_color, "public",
            {}, { card=droppedObject })
        end
    end

    local liftedPos = Vector(deckPos.x, 4, deckPos.z)  -- Lift even higher

    if deck then
      -- Step 1: Lock and Lift the deck
      deck.setLock(true)
      deck.setPositionSmooth(liftedPos, false, true)
    end

    Wait.time(function()
        -- Flip face-up cards face-down
        if not droppedObject.is_face_down then
            droppedObject.flip()
        end
        -- Step 2: Move dropped object under deck
        droppedObject.setPositionSmooth(Vector(deckPos.x, 2, deckPos.z), false, true)


        Wait.time(function()
            if deck then
              -- Step 3: Move deck back down
              deck.setLock(false)
              deck.setPositionSmooth(Vector(deckPos.x, 2, deckPos.z), false, true)
            end

            -- Step 4: After short delay, unlock the deck
            Wait.time(function()


                -- Step 5: Correct the name afterward
                Wait.time(function()
                    local newDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
                    if newDeck then
                        local name = newDeck.getName()
                        if not name:lower():find("main") then
                            newDeck.setName(name .. "main")
                        end
                    end
                end, 0.5)

            end, 0.6)

        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.5)

end

function waitUntilStable(obj, fn)
  if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return end
  Wait.condition(fn, function()
    return obj
      and not obj.isDestroyed()
      and not obj.isSmoothMoving()
      and not obj.spawning
  end)
end

function onObjectRotate(rotated_object, spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
  if not rotated_object then return end
  if rotated_object.tag ~= "Card" and rotated_object.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

  local faceup = flip ~= 180
  local isTapped = not ((old_spin > 45) and math.abs(old_spin - 180) > 45)

  local fieldGUID = playerfields[player_color]
  if not fieldGUID then return end

  -- Check if the card should transform or not
  local wasTransform = false
  if faceup == false and rotated_object.tag == "Card" then
    local inField = false
    local zones = rotated_object.getZones() or {}
    for _, z in ipairs(zones) do
      if z.guid == fieldGUID then inField = true; break end
    end
    if inField then
      waitUntilStable(rotated_object, function()
        local lastIdx = getLastStateIndex(rotated_object)
        if lastIdx and lastIdx > 1 and rotated_object.getStateId() ~= lastIdx then
          transformCardWhenStable(rotated_object, lastIdx, function(newObject)
            ReplayNet.log("CARD_TRANSFORMED", player_color, "public",
              {orientation="frontback"}, {card=newObject})
          end)
        end
      end)
    end
  end

  local is_transformed = rotated_object.getStates() and rotated_object.getStateId() > 1

  if(flip~=old_flip)then
    ReplayNet.log("CARD_FLIPPED", player_color, (faceup or is_transformed) and "public" or "private",
      { faceup = faceup }, {card=rotated_object} )
  end
  if rotated_object.tag == "Card" and (spin~=old_spin)then
    ReplayNet.log("CARD_ROTATED", player_color, (faceup or is_transformed) and "public" or "private",
      { rested = isTapped, faceup = faceup }, {card=rotated_object} )
  elseif rotated_object.tag == "Deck" and (spin~=old_spin)then
    ReplayNet.log("STACK_ROTATED", player_color, (faceup or is_transformed) and "public" or "private",
      { rested = isTapped, faceup = faceup }, {card=rotated_object} )
  end

  -- tiny delay helps ensure name/state/description are all “live”
  Wait.time(function()
    waitUntilStable(rotated_object, function()
      inscriptCardRulesText(rotated_object)
    end)
  end, 0.05)

end

  -- ---------- helpers ----------
  local function urlencode(s)
    return (tostring(s):gsub("\n", "\r\n"):gsub("([^%w _%-%.~])", function(c)
      return string.format("%%%02X", string.byte(c))
    end):gsub(" ", "%%20"))
  end

  local function clean(s)
    s = (s or ""):lower()
    s = s:gsub("[%p]", " "):gsub("%s+", " "):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
    return s
  end


  GA_NameIndex = GA_NameIndex or nil

  local function buildGANameIndex()
    local lib = GA_EffectLibrary or Global.getVar("GA_EffectLibrary")
    if not lib then
      print("ERROR: GA_EffectLibrary not set")
      return false
    end

    local ok, map = pcall(lib.call, "getMap")
    if not ok or not map then
      print("ERROR: getMap() failed on GA_EffectLibrary")
      return false
    end

    local index = {}

    for key, entry in pairs(map) do
      local slug = key:match("^(.-)$")
      if slug and entry and entry.name then
        table.insert(index, {
          slug = slug,
          name = entry.name,
          uuid = entry["default-uuid"],
          ["home-deck"] = entry["home-deck"]
        })
      end
    end

    GA_NameIndex = index
    print("GA name index built with " .. tostring(#index) .. " entries.")
    return true
  end


  -- rankName (Riftbound-style)
  -- 1   exact match
  -- 2.x full-word match, biased by earlier word index
  -- 3.x word startswith, biased by earlier word index
  -- 4.x contains, biased by earliest position
  -- 100 fallback
  local function rankName(name, q)
    local n = clean(name)
    local qn = clean(q)

    if n == qn then
      return 1
    end

    local qlen = #qn

    -- Scan words with positions
    local wordIndex = 0
    for startPos, word in n:gmatch("()(%S+)") do
      wordIndex = wordIndex + 1

      if word == qn then
        -- Rank 2, bias earlier words
        return 2 + wordIndex * 0.001
      end

      if word:sub(1, qlen) == qn then
        -- Rank 3, bias earlier words
        return 3 + wordIndex * 0.001
      end
    end

    -- Contains fallback (earliest position wins)
    local pos = n:find(qn, 1, true)
    if pos then
      return 4 + pos * 0.001
    end

    return 100
  end


  local function resolveGASlugFromNameFragment(fragment)
    if not GA_NameIndex then
      if not buildGANameIndex() then
        return nil
      end
    end

    local bestEntry = nil
    local bestRank = nil

    for _, entry in ipairs(GA_NameIndex) do
      local r = rankName(entry.name, fragment)
      if not bestRank
        or r < bestRank
        or (r == bestRank and #entry.name < #bestEntry.name)
      then
        bestRank = r
        bestEntry = entry
      end
    end

    return bestEntry
  end

local function spawnFromGASlug(entry, player, opts)
  local slug = entry.slug
  opts = opts or {}
  local uuid = opts.card_uuid or entry.uuid

  local urls = {}
  if uuid and uuid ~= "" then
    table.insert(urls, "https://grand-archive.tools/card/" .. tostring(uuid) .. "/json")
  end
  if slug and slug ~= "" then
    table.insert(urls, "https://grand-archive.tools/card/" .. tostring(slug) .. "/json")
  end

  local function spawnFromRawCardJson(raw)
    local blob = '{"cards":{"spawn":[' .. raw .. ']}}'
    local ok, cardData = pcall(JSON.decode, blob)
    if not ok or not cardData then return false end

    local location = opts.location_override or player.GetPointerPosition()
    location = { x = location.x, y = location.y, z = location.z }
    location.y = location.y + 1

    local spawned = Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
      json = cardData,
      player = player,
      locationOverride = location,
      rotationOverride = opts.rotation_override
    })
    if not spawned then
      return false
    end

    local gm_notes = parseGMNotes(spawned.getGMNotes())
    gm_notes["spawned"] = true
    spawned.setGMNotes(JSON.encode(gm_notes))

    local faceup = not isCardFaceDown(spawned)
    ReplayNet.log(
      "CARD_SPAWNED",
      player.color,
      faceup and "public" or "private",
      {},
      { card = spawned }
    )

    return true
  end

  local function tryFetch(index)
    if index > #urls then
      player.broadcast(
        "No card JSON for slug/uuid: " .. tostring(slug) .. " / " .. tostring(uuid),
        {1, 0.3, 0.3}
      )
      return
    end

    local url = urls[index]
    WebRequest.get(url, function(res)
      local code = res.response_code or res.status_code
      if (not res.is_error) and code == 200 and res.text and res.text ~= "" then
        if not spawnFromRawCardJson(res.text) then
          player.broadcast("Card JSON parse/spawn failed for: " .. tostring(slug), {1, 0.3, 0.3})
        end
        return
      end

      tryFetch(index + 1)
    end)
  end

  tryFetch(1)
end

function spawnFromGANameFragment(nameFragment, player_color)
  local player = Player[player_color]

  local entry = resolveGASlugFromNameFragment(nameFragment)
  if not entry then
    player.broadcast("No results for: " .. nameFragment, {1, 0.9, 0})
    return false
  end

  player.broadcast(
    "Spawning: " .. entry.name .. " [" .. entry.slug .. "]",
    {0.6, 1, 0.6}
  )

  spawnFromGASlug(entry, player)
  return true
end

local function tutorFromDeckByNameFragmentGA(nameFragment, player)
  local decks = {
    { name = "main",     deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "main") },
    { name = "material", deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "material") },
  }

  local best = {
    deck      = nil,
    deckName = nil,
    index    = nil,
    rank     = nil,
    name     = nil,
  }

  for _, d in ipairs(decks) do
    local deck = d.deck
    if deck and deck.tag == "Deck" then
      local objects = deck.getObjects()
      if objects then
        for i, entry in ipairs(objects) do
          local name = entry.nickname or entry.name or ""
          if name ~= "" then
            local r = rankName(name, nameFragment)
            if not best.rank
              or r < best.rank
              or (r == best.rank and #name < #best.name)
            then
              best.rank     = r
              best.index    = i
              best.name     = name
              best.deck     = deck
              best.deckName = d.name
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

  -- No usable match
  if not best.deck or not best.index or best.rank == 100 then
    player.broadcast("No match in deck for: " .. nameFragment, {1,0.9,0})
    return false
  end

  local taken = best.deck.takeObject({
    index    = best.index - 1, -- TTS uses 0-based indexing
    position = best.deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2.0, 0),
    rotation = {180, player.GetPointerRotation() + 180, 0},
    smooth   = true,
  })

  if not taken then
    player.broadcast("Failed to tutor card.", {1,0.3,0.3})
    return false
  end

  taken.setVelocity({0,0,0})
  taken.setAngularVelocity({0,0,0})

  Wait.frames(function()
    if taken then
      taken.setPositionSmooth(player.GetPointerPosition() + Vector(0, 1.5, 0))
    end
  end, 5)

  -- Private confirmation
  player.broadcast(
    "Tutored a card from your " .. best.deckName .. " deck.",
    {0.6, 1, 0.6}
  )

  -- Public anonymized notice
  for _, p in pairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
    if p.color ~= player.color then
      p.broadcast(
        player.steam_name .. " tutored a card.",
        {0.8, 0.8, 0.8}
      )
    end
  end

  -- Replay logging (identity handled lazily)
  ReplayNet.log(
    "CARD_TUTORED_FROM_DECK",
    player.color,
    "private",
    { source = best.deckName },
    { card = taken }
  )

  return taken
end

local function resolveGAEntryOrNotify(fragment, player)
  local entry = resolveGASlugFromNameFragment(fragment)
  if not entry then
    player.broadcast("No results for: " .. fragment, {1, 0.9, 0})
    return nil
  end
  return entry
end

function Replay_FinalizeFromWidget()
  ReplayNet.finalizeAndGetCode()
  REPLAY_STATE=0
  if GA_DGCrystalRecorder then
    GA_DGCrystalRecorder.call("refreshReplayState")
  end
end

GA_DEFAULT_BOOSTER_COLLATION = "PHANTOM_MONARCHS_8_CARD"
GA_UUIDIndex = GA_UUIDIndex or nil

local function buildGAUUIDIndex()
  local lib = GA_EffectLibrary or Global.getVar("GA_EffectLibrary")
  if not lib then
    print("ERROR: GA_EffectLibrary not set")
    return false
  end

  local ok, map = pcall(lib.call, "getMap")
  if not ok or not map then
    print("ERROR: getMap() failed on GA_EffectLibrary")
    return false
  end

  local idx = {}
  for slug, entry in pairs(map) do
    local uuid = entry and entry["default-uuid"] or nil
    if uuid and uuid ~= "" then
      idx[uuid] = {
        uuid = uuid,
        slug = slug,
        name = entry.name or slug,
      }
    end
  end
  GA_UUIDIndex = idx
  return true
end

local function resolveGAEntryFromUUID(uuid)
  if not GA_UUIDIndex then
    if not buildGAUUIDIndex() then
      return nil
    end
  end
  return GA_UUIDIndex[uuid]
end

function RipBoosterPack(params)
  params = params or {}
  local player_color = params.player_color
  local player = player_color and Player[player_color] or nil
  if not player then return false end

  local collationlib = GA_CollationLibrary or Global.getVar("GA_CollationLibrary")
  if not collationlib then
    player.broadcast("GA_CollationLibrary not loaded.", {1, 0.4, 0.4})
    return false
  end

  local collation_name = params.collation_name or GA_DEFAULT_BOOSTER_COLLATION
  local ok, pack_contents = pcall(
    collationlib.call,
    "GeneratePack",
    { collation_name = collation_name }
  )

  if not ok or not pack_contents or #pack_contents == 0 then
    player.broadcast("No booster collation found for " .. tostring(collation_name), {1, 0.4, 0.4})
    return false
  end

  local spawn_list = {}
  local function normalizeImageUrl(url)
    if type(url) ~= "string" or url == "" then return "" end
    if url:match("^https?://") then return url end
    if url:sub(1, 1) == "/" then
      return "https://api.gatcg.com" .. url
    end
    return url
  end

  local function normalizeCardDataImages(card_data)
    if type(card_data) ~= "table" then
      return card_data
    end

    card_data.image = normalizeImageUrl(card_data.image)

    local has_orientations = false
    if type(card_data.orientations) == "table" then
      for _, o in pairs(card_data.orientations) do
        if type(o) == "table" then
          o.image = normalizeImageUrl(o.image)
          has_orientations = true
        end
      end
    end
    if type(card_data.other_orientations) == "table" then
      for _, o in pairs(card_data.other_orientations) do
        if type(o) == "table" then
          o.image = normalizeImageUrl(o.image)
          has_orientations = true
        end
      end
    end
    if has_orientations and (not card_data.orientation or card_data.orientation == "") then
      card_data.orientation = "front"
    end
    return card_data
  end

  for _, card_uuid in ipairs(pack_contents) do
    local card_ok, card_data = pcall(collationlib.call, "getCardData", { uuid = card_uuid })
    if card_ok and card_data and card_data.image and card_data.image ~= "" then
      normalizeCardDataImages(card_data)
      table.insert(spawn_list, card_data)
    else
      player.broadcast("Missing booster card data for uuid " .. tostring(card_uuid), {1, 0.4, 0.4})
    end
  end

  if #spawn_list == 0 then
    player.broadcast("No booster card data available for " .. tostring(collation_name), {1, 0.4, 0.4})
    return false
  end

  local blob = { cards = { spawn = spawn_list } }
  local locationOverride = player.GetPointerPosition()
  local rotationOverride = {180, 180 + player.GetPointerRotation(), 0}
  locationOverride.y = locationOverride.y + 1

  Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
    json = blob,
    player = player,
    locationOverride = locationOverride,
    rotationOverride = rotationOverride
  })

  ReplayNet.log(
    "GA_BOOSTER_OPENED",
    player.color,
    "public",
    { collation_name = collation_name, card_count = #pack_contents }
  )

  if params.object then
    if params.object.destruct then
      params.object.destruct()
    elseif params.object.destroy then
      params.object.destroy()
    end
  end

  return true
end

function onChat(message, player)
  local m = message or ""

  if m == "!begin-replay" then
    ReplayNet.clear()
    for _, player_color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
      sendDeckSnapshotForReplay(player_color)
    end
    return false
  end

  if m == "!finalize-replay" then
    ReplayNet.finalizeAndGetCode()
    return false
  end

  local lower = m:lower()

  -- SPAWN / INDEX
  if lower:sub(1,6) == "index " or lower:sub(1,6) == "spawn " then
    local query = m:sub(7):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")
    if query == "" then
      player.broadcast("Usage: index <card name>", {1,0.9,0})
      return false
    end

    local entry = resolveGAEntryOrNotify(query, player)
    if not entry then return false end

    player.broadcast(
      "Spawning: " .. entry.name .. " [" .. entry.slug .. "]",
      {0.6,1,0.6}
    )

    spawnFromGASlug(entry, player)
    return false
  end

  -- TUTOR
  if lower:sub(1,6) == "tutor " then
    local query = m:sub(7):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")
    if query == "" then
      player.broadcast("Usage: tutor <card name>", {1,0.9,0})
      return false
    end

    tutorFromDeckByNameFragmentGA(query, player)
    return false
  end

  if lower == "booster" or lower == "rip booster" or lower == "rip-pack" then
    RipBoosterPack({
      player_color = player.color,
      collation_name = GA_DEFAULT_BOOSTER_COLLATION
    })
    return false
  end

  if lower:sub(1,8) == "booster " then
    local collation_name = m:sub(9):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")
    if collation_name == "" then
      player.broadcast("Usage: booster <collation_name>", {1, 0.9, 0})
      return false
    end
    RipBoosterPack({
      player_color = player.color,
      collation_name = collation_name
    })
    return false
  end

  return
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    Global.call("setMatSnapPoints", self)
    self.interactable = false
end

deck_text = ""

function setDecklistFromPlaymat(player, value, index)
  deck_text = value
end

function closeImportViewPlaymat(player, value, index)
  self.UI.setXml("")
end

function importDeckFromPlaymat(player, value, index)
  if deck_text=="" then
    broadcastToColor("Paste a shout, silvie, fractalofin, TcgArchitect, or jsonblob URL to import.", player.color, {.9,.6,.3})
  else
    Global.call("importDeckFromPlaymatRemote", {player=player, playmat=self, deck_text=deck_text})
  end
end

function ImportFinished()
  self.UI.setXml("")
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel
  id="decklist_root"
  width="380"
  height="110"
  position="0 0 -250"
  rotation="0 0 180"
  color="#1B1F2AFF"
  cornerRadius="14"
  padding="6 6 6 6"
>
  <!-- Outer accent border -->
  <Panel
    width="100%"
    height="100%"
    color="#C9B46A33"
    cornerRadius="12"
    padding="1 1 1 1"
  >
    <!-- Inner panel -->
    <Panel
      width="100%"
      height="100%"
      color="#232836FF"
      cornerRadius="10"
      padding="8 8 8 8"
    >
      <HorizontalLayout
        width="100%"
        height="100%"
        spacing="10"
        childAlignment="MiddleCenter"
      >
        <!-- LEFT IMAGE -->
        <Image
          id="import_icon"
          image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/9902464666137959499/A660F96A631DC442A4A3F1C98BA9A3F49EFB8F4E/"
          preserveAspect="true"
          preferredWidth="64"
          preferredHeight="64"
          color="#FFFFFFFF"
        />

        <!-- RIGHT CONTENT -->
        <VerticalLayout
          width="100%"
          height="100%"
          spacing="8"
          childAlignment="MiddleCenter"
        >
          <InputField
            id="decklist_input"
            preferredWidth="260"
            minWidth="260"
            minHeight="32"
            maxHeight="32"
            onEndEdit="setDecklistFromPlaymat"
            placeholder="Deck URL (Shout, Silvie, Fractalofin, TCG-Architect, etc)"
            cornerRadius="8"
            colors="#CCCCCC|#3E5F8C|#223754|#F0F6FF"
          />

          <HorizontalLayout>
            <Button
              id="import_deck"
              colors="#2F7DBA|#4FA0E0|#236195|#EAF6FF"
              fontStyle="Bold"
              fontSize="18"
              minHeight="34"
              minWidth="200"
              cornerRadius="10"
              onClick="importDeckFromPlaymat"
            >
              Import Deck
            </Button>

            <Button
              id="close_import"
              colors="#A33A2E|#C44E40|#7A2A22|#FFE6E3"
              fontStyle="Bold"
              fontSize="18"
              minHeight="34"
              maxWidth="34"
              cornerRadius="10"
              onClick="closeImportViewPlaymat"
            >
              X
            </Button>
          </HorizontalLayout>

        </VerticalLayout>
      </HorizontalLayout>
    </Panel>
  </Panel>
</Panel>

function getCorrectRotation()
  local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
  return sideOfTable and {0,0,0} or {0,180,0}
end

function onDrop(color)
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
end

function onLoad()
  self.setVar("noencode", true)
  -- ---------- Side drop-zone button ----------
  self.createButton({
      label          = "♻",
      click_function = "linkToDeckBottom",
      function_owner = Global,
      position       = {3, -0.35, 0},
      rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
      width          = 1400,
      height         = 1200,
      font_size      = 600,
      color          = {0.44, 0.66, 0.77, 1},
      font_color     = {0, 0, 0, 1},
      tooltip        = "Drop cards here to send to bottom",
  })
  Wait.frames(function() buildQuickActionUI() end, 10)
end

local function findById(node, wantId)
  if type(node) ~= "table" then return nil end

  local attrs = node.attributes
  if attrs and attrs.id == wantId then
    return node
  end

  local kids = node.children
  if kids then
    for _, child in ipairs(kids) do
      local found = findById(child, wantId)
      if found then return found end
    end
  end

  return nil
end

function buildQuickActionUI()
  local buttons = Global.getVar("QUICK_ACTION_BUTTONS")
  if type(buttons) ~= "table" then return end

  local alternatingColors = {
    "#88B8E8|#A8D8FF|#5088C8|#E8F8FF",
    "#70A8C4|#90C8E4|#4088A4|#D8F0FF",
  }
  local colorIndex = 1

  local buttonChildren = {}
  for _, entry in ipairs(buttons) do
    local fn = entry.fn or entry.function_name
    local label = entry.label or entry.text
    if fn and label then
      if not tostring(fn):match("^Global/") then
        fn = "Global/" .. tostring(fn)
      end

      table.insert(buttonChildren, {
        tag = "Button",
        attributes = {
          colors = alternatingColors[colorIndex],
          fontStyle = "Bold",
          fontSize = "50",
          onClick = fn,
        },
        value = tostring(label),
      })

      colorIndex = 3 - colorIndex
    end
  end

  local xml = self.UI.getXmlTable()
  local grid = findById(xml[1], "quick_action_grid")
  if not grid then
    print("[QuickActions] Could not find GridLayout id=quick_action_grid")
    return
  end

  grid.children = buttonChildren
  self.UI.setXmlTable(xml)
end

status_token_modes = {

    ["Imbued"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969389/F806E20BA9BEB8E94D869C7B8C0F004C32594084/",

    ["Ephemeral"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/15824654990132080817/CF963363B41203D879F35B356F880A08CE75CE76/",
 ["Used Up"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17975767217581539314/D69225E9179BCC849AD50BE162287EEB0A777DCD/",

      ["Frenzy"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/9987268309179907279/526D447EC9740A20613A2FD161576EF814D6BE41/",
 ["Distortion"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10101640314176795470/7C85EA7546724E156A54AD9C4F93ED2E4BD1D0CF/",
 ["Dontwake"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10182263191515917231/E0265689FBBE761D0EF3C3CB5242452A309310D3/",
 ["Immortality"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969400/72C870072D50344D76D326AF2EBCABB59D62DA2A/",
      ["True Sight"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969461/EAAC11EC772919F8AC026EA85B26B184A53A2D5C/",
    ["Spellshroud"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969411/E877AF2C163AA2E297920E5453189F66C511838F/",
    ["Brewed"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969279/9B00C1EE1A8A172D5D86E74CF3F3758B33FB5710/",
}

status_token_modes_by_number = {}
status_token_numbers_by_mode = {}
num_token_types = 0

current_mode = "Fracturized"
current_mode_number = 4

function findKeyByValue(table, value)
    for key, val in pairs(table) do
        if val == value then
            return key
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function onLoad()
  status_token_modes_by_number = {}
  status_token_numbers_by_mode = {}
  num_token_types = 0
  for mode, _ in pairs(status_token_modes) do
    self.addContextMenuItem(
      "Switch to " .. mode,
      function(player_color, position, object)
        setTokenImage(mode, player_color)
      end)
    num_token_types = num_token_types + 1
    status_token_modes_by_number[num_token_types] = mode
    status_token_numbers_by_mode[mode] = num_token_types
  end

  self.addTag("StatusToken")
end

function setTokenImage(mode, player_color)
    local custom = self.getCustomObject()
    custom.face = status_token_modes[mode]
    self.setCustomObject(custom)
    self.setName(mode .. " Token")
    current_mode = mode
    current_mode_number = status_token_numbers_by_mode[mode]
    Global.call("onMarkerSetIdentityRemote", {marker=self, player_color=player_color})
end

function onNumberTyped(player_color, number)
  if number == 0 then
    number = (current_mode_number % num_token_types) + 1
  end
  setTokenImage(status_token_modes_by_number[number], player_color)
  return true
end

function getCorrectRotation()
  local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
  return sideOfTable and {0,0,0} or {0,180,0}
end

function onDrop(color)
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
  local tokenPos = self.getPosition()

  local closest, bestDist = nil, 2.0  -- only within 1 unit
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.tag == "Card" and not obj.hasTag("StatusToken") then
      local d = (obj.getPosition() - tokenPos):magnitude()
      if d < bestDist then
        closest, bestDist = obj, d
      end
    end
  end

  if closest then
    local r = closest.getRotation()
    local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
    if sideOfTable then
      r.y = (r.y + spin) % 360
    else
      r.y = (r.y - spin) % 360
    end
    closest.setRotationSmooth(r, false, true)
  end

  Wait.time(function()
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
  end, 0.1)
end
