ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--Suppressed
--By Tipsy Hobbit, adapted for GA by Amphi
pID = "GA_Suppress"
version = '1.12'

function onload()
  self.createButton({
  label="+", click_function='registerModule', function_owner=self,
  position={0,0.2,-0.5}, height=100, width=100, font_size=100,
  rotation={0,0,0},tooltip="Version: "..version
  })
  Wait.condition(registerModule,function() return Global.getVar('Encoder') ~= nil and true or false end)
end
function registerModule()
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
		properties = {
		propID = pID,
		name = "Suppressed",
		values = {'ga_suppressed'},
		funcOwner = self,
		tags='tool,face_prop',
		activateFunc ='suppress'
		}
		enc.call("APIregisterProperty",properties)
    value = {
    valueID = 'ga_suppressed',
    validType = 'boolean',
    desc = 'GA: Is the card suppressed?.',
    default = false
    }
    enc.call("APIregisterValue",value)
  end
end
function createButtons(t)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    flip = enc.call("APIgetFlip",{obj=t.obj})
    scaler = {x=0.5,y=0.5,z=0.5}--t.obj.getScale()
    temp = "SUPPRESSED\r\nclick to return"
    barSize,fsize,offset_x,offset_y = enc.call('APIformatButton',{str=temp,font_size=400,max_len=90,xJust=0,yJust=0})
    t.obj.createButton({
    label=temp, click_function='unsuppress', function_owner=self,
    position={(0+offset_x)*flip*scaler.x,0.63*flip*scaler.z,(0+offset_y)*scaler.y}, height=800, width=1300, font_size=200,color={0,0,0,1},font_color={0.3,0.8,0.3,1},
    rotation={0,90,90-90*flip,tooltip="This object is Suppressed."}
    })
  end
end
function suppress(obj,ply)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    enc.call("APItoggleProperty",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
    data = enc.call("APIobjGetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		if data.ga_suppressed ~= true then
			data.ga_suppressed = true
    else
      data.ga_suppressed = false
    end
    enc.call("APIobjSetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID,data=data})
    enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
  end
  local ga_menu = Global.getVar('GA_Menu')
  ga_menu.call("shutMenu", {obj=obj})  
end
function unsuppress(obj,ply)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil and enc.call("APIobjectExists",{obj=obj}) then
    flip = enc.call("APIgetFlip",{obj=obj})

		data = enc.call("APIobjGetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		if data.ga_suppressed == true then
			data.ga_suppressed = false
			enc.call("APIobjSetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID,data=data})
      enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		end
		if type(ply) == "string" then
			local selection =Player[ply].getSelectedObjects()
			if selection ~= nil then
				for k,v in pairs(selection) do
					if v ~= tar and enc.call("APIobjectExists",{obj=v}) == true then
						unsuppress(v,0)
					end
				end
			end
		end
    enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
  end
end
function updateModule(wr)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    wr = wr.text
    wrv = string.match(wr,"version = '(.-)'")
    if wrv == 'DEPRECIATED' then
      enc.call("APIremoveProperty",{propID=pID})
      self.destruct()
    end
    local ver = enc.call("APIversionComp",{wv=wrv,cv=version})
    if ''..ver ~= ''..version then
      broadcastToAll("An update has been found for "..pID..". Reloading Module.")
      self.script_code = wr
      self.reload()
    else
      broadcastToAll("No update found for "..pID..". Carry on.")
    end
  end
end

--GA_ImportReferences
--By Amphi
pID = "GA_ImportReferences"
version = '1'

function onload()
  self.createButton({
  label="+", click_function='registerModule', function_owner=self,
  position={0,0.2,-0.5}, height=100, width=100, font_size=100,
  rotation={0,0,0},tooltip="Version: "..version
  })
  Wait.condition(registerModule,function() return Global.getVar('Encoder') ~= nil and true or false end)
end
function registerModule()
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
		properties = {
		propID = "GA_References",
		name = "Spawn Tokens",
		values = {},
		funcOwner = self,
		tags='tool,face_prop',
		activateFunc ='summonReferences'
		}
    enc.call("APIregisterProperty",properties)

    properties2 = {
		propID = "GA_Gather",
		name = "Gather",
		values = {},
		funcOwner = self,
		tags='tool,face_prop',
		activateFunc ='summonRandomReference'
		}
    enc.call("APIregisterProperty",properties2)
  end
end
function createButtons(t)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    print("aaa")
  end
end

cachedReferences = {}

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end


local function subjectCardName(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end
  if obj.tag == "Card" then
    return obj.getName()
  elseif obj.tag == "Deck" then
    local entry = getVisibleDeckEntry(obj)
    if entry then
      -- entry.nickname is usually the printed title; fall back to name
      return entry.nickname or entry.name
    end
  end
  return nil
end

local temp_gather_hack_json = {
  { name = "Blightroot",  slug = "blightroot"  },
  { name = "Manaroot",    slug = "manaroot"    },
  { name = "Silvershine", slug = "silvershine" },
  { name = "Fraysia",     slug = "fraysia"     },
  { name = "Razorvine",   slug = "razorvine"   },
  { name = "Springleaf",  slug = "springleaf"  },
}

function summonRandomReference(obj, ply)
  summonReferences(obj,ply,true)
end

function summonReferences(obj, ply, is_random)
    local enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
    local name = subjectCardName(obj)
    if is_random then
      print ("Spawning Random Reference for " .. name)
    else
      print ("Spawning References for " .. name)
    end
    local slug = name:lower():gsub(" ", "-"):gsub("'", ""):gsub(",", "")

    if cachedReferences[slug] != nil then
      summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
    elseif enc ~= nil then
        if is_random then
          -- temp hack because index doesn't have all the gather references
          cachedReferences[slug] = temp_gather_hack_json
          summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
        else
          local url = "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/" .. slug
          WebRequest.get(url, function(response)
              if response.is_error then
                log(response.error)
              else
                  local jsonData = JSON.decode(response.text)
                  cachedReferences[slug] = jsonData.references
                  summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
              end
          end)
        end
    else
        print("Encoder not found.")
    end
    if not is_random then
      local ga_menu = Global.getVar('GA_Menu')
      ga_menu.call("shutMenu", {obj=obj})
    end
end

function tablelength(T)
  local count = 0
  for _ in pairs(T) do count = count + 1 end
  return count
end

function summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
  if cachedReferences[slug] then
      reference_count = tablelength(cachedReferences[slug])
      random_roll = math.random(reference_count)
      index=1
      for _, reference in ipairs(cachedReferences[slug]) do
        if is_random == false or index == random_roll then
          summonOneCard(reference.slug, Player[ply], obj)
        end
        index = index + 1
      end
  else
      print("No references found.")
  end
end

cachedCards = {}

function summonOneCard(slug, player, obj)
    local url = "https://grand-archive.tools/card/" .. slug .. "/json"

    if cachedCards[slug] ~= nil then
      summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)
      return
    end

    WebRequest.get(url, function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            log(request.error)
        elseif request.response_code == 204 then
            log("No card was found for URL: " .. url)
        elseif request.response_code == 200 then
            local jsonBlob = '{"cards": {"spawn": [' ..  request.text .. ']}}'

            local cardData = JSON.decode(jsonBlob)

            if not cardData or not cardData.cards then
                log("Invalid JSON.")
            end
            cachedCards[slug] = cardData

            summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)

        else
            log("Unknown issue retrieving card data from: " .. jsonUrl)
        end
    end)
end

function summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)
  local spawner_pos = obj.getPosition()
  local zsign = spawner_pos.z / math.abs( spawner_pos.z )
  local deckObjectData = Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
      json  = cachedCards[slug],
      player = player,
      locationOverride = {spawner_pos.x+1,spawner_pos.y+1,spawner_pos.z-(zsign*4)},
      rotationOverride = obj.getRotation()
  })
end

function getMap() return M end

function getEntry(params)
  return M[params["slug"]]
end

function getRawEffect(params)
  local e = M[params["slug"]]
  return e and e["effect"]
end

function onLoad(saved_data)
  Global.setVar('GA_EffectLibrary', self)
end

ObjectStates.Name: PiecePack_Moons
ObjectStates.Description: Menu for managing might, equipment, and spawning tokens
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
prop_id = "ga-load-menu"
version = "1.0.0"
card_scale = 1.42055011

playerfieldzones = {
    Red    = "e5fb87",
    Blue   = "1236a0",
    Green  = "5fd0e9",
    Purple = "936992"
}

local encoder
do
	local mt = {
		__index = function(self, index)
			return function(args) return rawget(self, "object").call("API" .. index, args) end
		end
	}

	encoder = function()
		local object = Global.getVar("Encoder")
		return object ~= nil and setmetatable({ object = object }, mt) or nil
	end
end

local function register_module()
	local enc = encoder()
	if enc == nil then return end

	if tonumber(enc.object.getVar("version"):match("%d+%.%d+")) < 4.4 then
		broadcastToAll("encoder version must be >=4.4", { 1, 0, 0, 1 })
		error("bad encoder version")
	end

	enc.registerProperty {
		propID = prop_id,
		name = "Card Menu",
		values = { "ga_cards_loaded"},
		tags = "basic,counter",
		visible = false,
		visible_in_hand = 0,

		funcOwner = self,
		activateFunc = "",
	}

	enc.registerValue {
		valueID = "ga_cards_loaded",
		validType = "nil",
		desc = "",
		default = {},
	}

end

buffZoneGuid = "2fad01"

function isObjectInBuffZone(obj)
		local isInBuffZone = false
		local isInChampionZone = false
    if not obj then return false end
    for _, z in ipairs(obj.getZones()) do
			for _, fieldZone in pairs(playerfieldzones) do
        if z.guid == fieldZone then
            isInBuffZone = true
        end
				if z.getName() == "MaterialDeckZone" then
					isInMaterialDeckZone = true
				end
			end
    end
    return isInBuffZone and not isInChampionZone
end

local function init_card(card)
	if card.tag ~= "Card" then return end
	if card.getVar('noencode') ~= nil and card.getVar('noencode') == true then return end

	local enc = encoder()
	if enc == nil then return end

	if not enc.objectExists { obj = card } then enc.encodeObject { obj = card } end

	if not enc.propertyExists { propID = prop_id } then return end

	if not enc.objIsPropEnabled { obj = card, propID = prop_id } then
		enc.objEnableProp { obj = card, propID = prop_id }
		enc.rebuildButtons { obj = card }
	end
end

local function equipped_offset(i)
	local col = math.floor(i / 2)
	local row = i % 2
	return Vector(-1.85 - 1.35 * col, 0.07 + row * (-0.05 / 2), -0.55 + row * (2.1 / 2))
end

function findEquipTargets(gearObj)
    if not gearObj or gearObj.tag ~= "Card" then return {} end

    local hits = Physics.cast({
        origin       = gearObj.getPosition() + Vector(0, 0.2, 0),
        direction    = {0, -1, 0},
        max_distance = 1.5,
        type         = 3, -- box
        size         = {2.5 * card_scale, 0.2, 3 * card_scale},
        debug        = false,
    })

    local candidates = {}

    for _, hit in ipairs(hits) do
        local hitObj = hit.hit_object
        if hitObj
            and hitObj ~= gearObj
            and hitObj.tag == "Card"
            and not hitObj.is_face_down
						and hitObj.getPosition().y < gearObj.getPosition().y
        then
            table.insert(candidates, hitObj)
        end
    end

    table.sort(candidates, function(a, b)
        local pa, pb = a.getPosition(), b.getPosition()
        if math.abs(pa.x - pb.x) > 0.01 then
            return pa.x < pb.x
        end
        return pa.z > pb.z
    end)

    return candidates
end


function refreshButtons(obj)
	if obj.tag ~= "Card" or obj.getName() == "Reset-Flourish" then return end
	local enc = encoder()
	if enc == nil then return end
	local flip = enc.getFlip { obj = obj } or 1
	if flip == -1 then return end

  if not isObjectInBuffZone(obj) then return end

	local menu_properties = enc.objGetPropData { obj = obj, propID = prop_id }
	if #menu_properties.ga_cards_loaded > 0 then
		obj.createButton {
			label = "X",
			position = {1.35, 0.3, -1.4},
			scale = {0.45, 0.45, 0.45},
			width = 550,
			height = 550,
			color = {0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 1},
			font_color = {1, 1, 1, 1},
			font_size = 420,

			tooltip = "unequip all",

			click_function = 'unequip_all',
			function_owner = self,
		}
	end

  if false then
	--if #findEquipTargets(obj) > 0 then
		obj.createButton({
				function_owner = self,
				label = "LOAD",  -- Spawn symbol
				position = {0.8, 0.3, -0.5},
				scale = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5},
				width = 800,
				height = 400,
				color = {0, 0, 0, 1},
				font_color = {0, 215, 250, 1},
				font_size = 300,
				tooltip = "Equip",
				click_function = "equip_to_overlapped_card"
		})
	end

end

function equip_to_overlapped_card(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return end

    local enc = encoder()
    if not enc then return end

    local candidates = findEquipTargets(obj)
    if #candidates == 0 then
        broadcastToColor("No valid card to equip to.", player_color, {1, 0.4, 0.4})
        return
    end

    local target = candidates[1]

    -- Ensure encoder data exists
    if not enc.objectExists { obj = target } then
        enc.encodeObject { obj = target }
    end
    if not enc.objIsPropEnabled { obj = target, propID = prop_id } then
        enc.objEnableProp { obj = target, propID = prop_id }
    end

    local data = enc.objGetPropData { obj = target, propID = prop_id }
    data.ga_cards_loaded = data.ga_cards_loaded or {}

    -- Position + attach
    local offsetIndex = #data.ga_cards_loaded
    obj.setPosition(target.positionToWorld(equipped_offset(offsetIndex)))
    obj.setRotation(target.getRotation(), false, false)
    obj.setScale({card_scale / 1.618, card_scale / 1.618, card_scale / 1.618})
    obj.locked = true
    target.addAttachment(obj)

    table.insert(data.ga_cards_loaded, #target.getAttachments())

    enc.objSetPropData { obj = target, propID = prop_id, data = data }
    enc.rebuildButtons { obj = target }

    Global.call("onLoadCardRemote", {
        unit_object = target,
        gear_object = obj,
        player_color = player_color,
    })

    broadcastToColor(
        "Equipped to " .. (target.getName() or "card"),
        player_color,
        {0.6, 0.9, 1}
    )
end

function unequip_all(obj, ply)
	local enc = encoder()
	if enc == nil then return end

	local menu_properties = enc.objGetPropData { obj = obj, propID = prop_id }
	if #menu_properties.ga_cards_loaded == 0 then return end

	local origin = obj.getPosition()

	for i = #menu_properties.ga_cards_loaded, 1, -1 do
	    local new = obj.removeAttachment(menu_properties.ga_cards_loaded[i] - 1)
			local unequip_offset = Vector(-1.6+ i*-0.45, 0.1 + i*0.6, -1 + i* 0.45)
			new.setPositionSmooth(obj.positionToWorld(unequip_offset), false, true)
	    new.setScale({ card_scale, 1, card_scale })
			new.setRotation( obj.getRotation() )
			new.setVelocity({0,0,0})
			new.setAngularVelocity({0,0,0})
			new.locked = false

	end

	enc.objSetPropData { obj = obj, propID = prop_id, data = { ga_cards_loaded={} } }
	enc.rebuildButtons { obj = obj }
end


local function isHandZone(zone)
		return zone.tag=="Hand"
end


local function cleanupCardLeavingPlay(card)
    if not card or card.tag ~= "Card" or card.getName() == "Reset-Flourish" then return end


    local enc = encoder()
    if not enc then return end
    if not enc.objectExists { obj = card } then return end
    if not enc.objIsPropEnabled { obj = card, propID = prop_id } then return end

    local data = enc.objGetPropData { obj = card, propID = prop_id } or {}

    enc.objSetPropData {
        obj = card,
        propID = prop_id,
        data = data
    }

		unequip_all(card, nil)

    card.UI.setXml("") -- clear UI overlay
    enc.rebuildButtons { obj = card }
end

local destroyedGuids = {}

function onObjectDestroy(obj)
  if obj then
    destroyedGuids[obj.guid] = true
  end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
  if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return end
	for _, fieldZone in pairs(playerfieldzones) do
		if zone.guid == fieldZone then
			Wait.frames(function()
				if not destroyedGuids[obj.guid] then
					cleanupCardLeavingPlay(obj)
				end
				destroyedGuids[obj.guid] = nil
			end, 1)
		end
	end
end

function getCardUnderPointer(player_color)
    local player = Player[player_color]
    if not player then return nil end

    local pointerPos = player.getPointerPosition()
    if not pointerPos then return nil end

    -- Cast downward from slightly above the pointer
    local hits = Physics.cast({
        origin       = pointerPos + Vector(0, 2, 0),
        direction    = {0, -1, 0},
        max_distance = 5,
        type         = 3, -- box cast (more forgiving than ray)
        size         = {1.2, 0.2, 1.7}, -- roughly card-sized
        debug        = false,
    })

    for _, hit in ipairs(hits) do
        local obj = hit.hit_object
        if obj and obj.tag == "Card" then
            return obj
        end
    end

    return nil
end

function onScriptingButtonDown(index, player_color)
    print(index)
    if index ~= 8 then return end
    local card = getCardUnderPointer(player_color)
    if not card then
        broadcastToColor("No card under cursor.", player_color, {1,0.4,0.4})
        return
    end
    equip_to_overlapped_card(card, player_color, false)
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if not obj or obj.tag ~= "Card" then return end
    if not isHandZone(zone) then return end

  	cleanupCardLeavingPlay(obj)
end

function onload()
	self.addContextMenuItem("Register Module", register_module)
	Wait.condition(register_module, function() return Global.getVar("Encoder") ~= nil end, 30)

end

function createButtons(params)
	refreshButtons(params.obj)
end

function onObjectPickUp(player_color, picked_up_object)
	cleanupCardLeavingPlay(obj)
end

function onObjectDropped(ply, obj)
	init_card(obj)
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    Global.call("setMatSnapPoints", self)
    self.interactable = false
end

deck_text = ""

function setDecklistFromPlaymat(player, value, index)
  deck_text = value
end

function closeImportViewPlaymat(player, value, index)
  self.UI.setXml("")
end

function importDeckFromPlaymat(player, value, index)
  if deck_text=="" then
    broadcastToColor("Paste a shout, silvie, fractalofin, TcgArchitect, or jsonblob URL to import.", player.color, {.9,.6,.3})
  else
    Global.call("importDeckFromPlaymatRemote", {player=player, playmat=self, deck_text=deck_text})
  end
end

function ImportFinished()
  self.UI.setXml("")
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
MIN_VALUE = 0
MAX_VALUE = 99

local val = 0
local color = ""

local PLAYER_COLORS = {
    Red    = "#D14C4C", -- soft crimson
    Blue   = "#4C7FD1", -- calm sapphire
    Green  = "#4FA36A", -- jade green
    Purple = "#8A5FD1", -- arcane violet
}
-- ---------- LOAD / SAVE ----------

function onLoad(saved_data)
    self.interactable = true

    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local ok, data = pcall(JSON.decode, saved_data)
        if ok and data and data[1] then
            val = data[1]
        end
    end

    rebuildUI()
    createButtons()
end

function updateSave()
    self.script_state = JSON.encode({ val })
end

-- ---------- UI ----------

function rebuildUI()
    local objectColor = "White"

    do
        local nameColor = self.getName():match("^(%S+)")
        if PLAYER_COLORS[nameColor] then
            objectColor = nameColor
        end
    end


    local fontColor = PLAYER_COLORS[objectColor] or "#FFFFFF"

    local xml = [[
    <Panel width="140" height="140" position="0 0 -10" rotation="0 0 0">
        <Text
            id="score"
            text="]] .. val .. [["
            fontSize="80"
            fontStyle="Bold"
            alignment="MiddleCenter"
            color="]] .. fontColor .. [["
        />
    </Panel>
    ]]

    self.UI.setXml(xml)
end


function createButtons()
    self.clearButtons()

    -- Single invisible button that handles both clicks
    self.createButton({
        click_function = "onClick",
        function_owner = self,
        position = {0, 0.08, .25},
        width = 500,
        height = 250,
        color = {.1,.1,.1,.5},
        tooltip = self.getName()
    })
    self.createButton({
        click_function = "onClickDown",
        function_owner = self,
        position = {0, 0.08, -.27},
        width = 500,
        height = 250,
        color = {.1,.1,.1,.5},
        tooltip = self.getName()
    })
end

function onClick(_, player_color, alt_click)
    local delta = alt_click and -1 or 1
    setValue(val + delta, player_color)
end

function onClickDown(_, player_color, alt_click)
    setValue(val -1, player_color)
end

-- ---------- LOGIC ----------
function setValueRemote(params)
   setValue(params.value, params.player_color)
end

function setValue(newVal, player_color)
    newVal = math.max(MIN_VALUE, math.min(MAX_VALUE, newVal))
    if newVal == val then return end

    val = newVal
    rebuildUI()
    updateSave()

    local nameColor = self.getName():match("^(%S+)")

    Global.call("onAdjustChampionDamageRemote", {
        player_color = nameColor,
        new_score = val
    })
end

-- ---------- UTIL ----------

function reset_val()
    val = 0
    rebuildUI()
    updateSave()
end

self.max_typed_number = 99
function onNumberTyped(_, int)
    setValue(int)
end

ObjectStates.Name: CardCustom
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function getCorrectRotation()
  local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
  return sideOfTable and {0,0,0} or {0,180,0}
end

function onDrop(color)
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
end

function onLoad()
  self.setVar("noencode", true)
  -- ---------- Side drop-zone button ----------
  self.createButton({
      label          = "♻",
      click_function = "linkToDeckBottom",
      function_owner = Global,
      position       = {3, -0.35, 0},
      rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
      width          = 1400,
      height         = 1200,
      font_size      = 600,
      color          = {0.44, 0.66, 0.77, 1},
      font_color     = {0, 0, 0, 1},
      tooltip        = "Drop cards here to send to bottom",
  })
  Wait.frames(function() buildQuickActionUI() end, 10)
end

local function findById(node, wantId)
  if type(node) ~= "table" then return nil end

  local attrs = node.attributes
  if attrs and attrs.id == wantId then
    return node
  end

  local kids = node.children
  if kids then
    for _, child in ipairs(kids) do
      local found = findById(child, wantId)
      if found then return found end
    end
  end

  return nil
end

function buildQuickActionUI()
  local buttons = Global.getVar("QUICK_ACTION_BUTTONS")
  if type(buttons) ~= "table" then return end

  local alternatingColors = {
    "#88B8E8|#A8D8FF|#5088C8|#E8F8FF",
    "#70A8C4|#90C8E4|#4088A4|#D8F0FF",
  }
  local colorIndex = 1

  local buttonChildren = {}
  for _, entry in ipairs(buttons) do
    local fn = entry.fn or entry.function_name
    local label = entry.label or entry.text
    if fn and label then
      if not tostring(fn):match("^Global/") then
        fn = "Global/" .. tostring(fn)
      end

      table.insert(buttonChildren, {
        tag = "Button",
        attributes = {
          colors = alternatingColors[colorIndex],
          fontStyle = "Bold",
          fontSize = "50",
          onClick = fn,
        },
        value = tostring(label),
      })

      colorIndex = 3 - colorIndex
    end
  end

  local xml = self.UI.getXmlTable()
  local grid = findById(xml[1], "quick_action_grid")
  if not grid then
    print("[QuickActions] Could not find GridLayout id=quick_action_grid")
    return
  end

  grid.children = buttonChildren
  self.UI.setXmlTable(xml)
end

    print("[QuickActions] Could not find GridLayout id=quick_action_grid")
    return
  end

  grid.children = buttonChildren
  self.UI.setXmlTable(xml)
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- ============================================
-- Replay Widget Object Script (Global-State)
-- ============================================

TEXTURE_OFF     = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10463570369830300439/4CD763A3EA0564678271287A8AD2D55ABA08C0FD/"
TEXTURE_QUIET   = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17401227207577344761/454F3CDA6693C3D5934BA481059330F65BC6E1EB/"
TEXTURE_ATTRACT = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/13394472204119261288/D5EF71ED3AA165AE9A33442884E0334B7C1A6BD9/"

BUTTON_HEIGHT = 0.1
BUTTON_WIDTH  = 1600
BUTTON_FONT   = 180

-- ============================================
-- Remote Callable State Refresh
-- ============================================

function refreshReplayState()
   updateVisual()
   rebuildButtons()
end

-- ============================================
-- Finalize Button
-- ============================================

function onFinalizePressed(_, playerColor)
   local replay_state = Global.call("GetReplayState")
   if replay_state ~= 2 then return end

   Global.call("Replay_FinalizeFromWidget", { player = playerColor })
end

function onObjectRandomize(object, player_color)
  if self == object then
    local replay_state = Global.call("GetReplayState")
    if replay_state == 1 then return end
    Global.call("Replay_FinalizeFromWidget", { player = playerColor })
  end
end

-- ============================================
-- Visual Update
-- ============================================

function updateVisual()
   local replay_state = Global.call("GetReplayState")

   local texture = TEXTURE_QUIET
   if replay_state == 0 then
       texture = TEXTURE_OFF
   elseif replay_state == 1 then
       texture = TEXTURE_QUIET
   elseif replay_state == 2 then
       texture = TEXTURE_ATTRACT
   end

   local data = self.getCustomObject()
   if not data then return end

   if data.diffuse == texture then return end
   data.diffuse = texture
   self.setCustomObject(data)
   self.reload()
end

-- ============================================
-- Buttons
-- ============================================

function rebuildButtons()
   self.clearButtons()

   local replay_state = Global.call("GetReplayState")

   if replay_state == 2 then
     createDualButton("Finalize Replay", "onFinalizePressed")
   elseif replay_state == 1 then

   elseif replay_state == 0 then

   end
end

function createDualButton(label, func)
   self.createButton({
       label = label,
       click_function = func,
       function_owner = self,
       position = {0, BUTTON_HEIGHT, 0.75},
       rotation = {0, 0, 0},
       width = BUTTON_WIDTH,
       height = 250,
       font_size = BUTTON_FONT,
       color = {.5,.5,.5,1},
       font_color = {0,0,0}
   })

   self.createButton({
       label = label,
       click_function = func,
       function_owner = self,
       position = {0, BUTTON_HEIGHT, -0.75},
       rotation = {0, 180, 0},
       width = BUTTON_WIDTH,
       height = 250,
       font_size = BUTTON_FONT,
       color = {.5,.5,.5,1},
       font_color = {0,0,0}
   })
end

-- ============================================
-- On Load
-- ============================================

function onLoad()
   Global.setVar('GA_DGCrystalRecorder', self)
end

}

PACK_MODE_ORDER = { "PTM", "HVN", "MRC1E", "MRCALT", "DTR", "AMB1E", "AMBALT", "ALC", "ALCALT", "FTC", "DOA1E", "DOAALT" }
current_mode = "PTM"

local function parseGMNotesSafe(raw)
  if not raw or raw == "" then return {} end
  local ok, parsed = pcall(JSON.decode, raw)
  if ok and type(parsed) == "table" then
    return parsed
  end
  return {}
end

local function getStoredMode()
  local notes = parseGMNotesSafe(self.getGMNotes())
  local mode = notes.booster_mode
  if mode == "ABH" or mode == "ABYSSAL_HEAVEN" then
    mode = "HVN"
  end
  if PACK_MODES[mode] then
    return mode
  end
  return nil
end

local function setStoredMode(mode_key)
  local notes = parseGMNotesSafe(self.getGMNotes())
  notes.booster_mode = mode_key
  self.setGMNotes(JSON.encode(notes))
end

local function setVisualOnly(mode_key)
  local mode = PACK_MODES[mode_key]
  if not mode then return end

  local custom = self.getCustomObject() or {}
  if custom.diffuse then
    custom.diffuse = mode.art_url
  elseif custom.DiffuseURL then
    custom.DiffuseURL = mode.art_url
  end
  self.setCustomObject(custom)
  self.setName("Flip it to Rip it")
end

local function rebuildSelfForMode(mode_key, player_color)
  local mode = PACK_MODES[mode_key]
  if not mode then return end

  local data = self.getData()
  data.Nickname = "Flip it to Rip it"
  data.GMNotes = JSON.encode({ booster_mode = mode_key })
  if type(data.CustomMesh) == "table" then
    data.CustomMesh.DiffuseURL = mode.art_url
  end

  local pos = self.getPosition()
  local rot = self.getRotation()
  local lock = self.getLock()
  local scale = self.getScale()

  spawnObjectData({
    data = data,
    position = pos,
    rotation = rot,
    callback_function = function(new_obj)
      new_obj.setLock(lock)
      new_obj.setScale(scale)
      if player_color then
        broadcastToColor("Booster set to " .. mode.menu_name, player_color, {0.6, 1, 0.6})
      end
    end
  })

  self.destruct()
end

local function applyPackMode(mode_key, player_color, use_rebuild)
  local mode = PACK_MODES[mode_key]
  if not mode then return end

  current_mode = mode_key
  setStoredMode(mode_key)

  if use_rebuild then
    rebuildSelfForMode(mode_key, player_color)
    return
  end

  setVisualOnly(mode_key)
end

function onLoad(saved_data)
  local requested = getStoredMode() or current_mode
  if not PACK_MODES[requested] then
    requested = "PTM"
  end
  current_mode = requested

  for _, mode_key in ipairs(PACK_MODE_ORDER) do
    local mode = PACK_MODES[mode_key]
    self.addContextMenuItem("Set to " .. mode.menu_name, function(player_color)
      applyPackMode(mode_key, player_color, true)
    end)
  end

  applyPackMode(current_mode, nil, false)
end

function onObjectRotate(rotated_object, spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
  if flip ~= old_flip and rotated_object == self then
    local mode = PACK_MODES[current_mode] or PACK_MODES.PTM
    Global.call("RipBoosterPack", {
      player_color = player_color,
      object = self,
      collation_name = mode.collation_name
    })
  end
end
